title: Police block thousands of 'cockroach' protesters marching on India's parliament
english: Thousands of protesters, led by the youth-driven Cockroach Janta Party, marched in Delhi to demand the Indian education minister's resignation following widespread exam paper scandals. Security forces blocked their path to parliament, resulting in minor clashes and reports of injuries. The movement, which has gained national attention, expresses growing public dissatisfaction with the government and solidarity with activist Sonam Wangchuk.
amharic: የህንድ የትምህርት ሚኒስትር በፈተና ወረቀት መፍሰስ ቅሌት ምክንያት ስልጣናቸውን እንዲለቁ የሚጠይቁ በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ተቃዋሚዎች በዴልሂ ሰላማዊ ሰልፍ አድርገዋል። በወጣቶች የተመራው ይህ ንቅናቄ ወደ ፓርላማ ህንፃ ለመድረስ ቢሞክርም በፖሊስ ታግዷል፣ ይህም በአካባቢው ግጭት አስነስቷል። ለሳምንታት የዘለቀው ይህ የተቃውሞ እንቅስቃሴ በአሁኑ ወቅት በመንግስት ላይ ያለውን ህዝባዊ ቅሬታ በግልፅ እያሳየ ይገኛል።
oromo: Hiriirri mormii guddaan magaalaa Deelhii keessatti geggeeffamee, barattoonniifi deggartoonni 'Cockroach Janta Party' jedhamu ministeerri barnootaa Indiyaa aangoorraa akka bu'an gaafataniiru. Poolisoonni hiriirtota gara mana maree (parlaamaa) deemaniif daandii cufuudhaan walitti buiinsi xiqqoon akka uumamu ta'eera. Mormiin kun rakkoo qormaata barnootaa fi mormii mootummaa irratti xiyyeeffatu yoo ta'u, erga dhaabbileen kun beekamtii argatee as gaaffiin ummataa daran dabalaa dhufeera.

title: Scores feared dead after passenger ferry capsizes off Guyana
english: A passenger ferry named MV Barima capsized off the coast of Guyana on Saturday, leaving many people missing and feared dead. While 67 survivors have been rescued, officials believe the passenger list was inaccurate, meaning more people may have been on board than reported. Authorities have detained the captain and crew members after testing positive for drugs, and a formal investigation is underway to determine if negligence led to the disaster.
amharic: በጉያና የባህር ዳርቻ ላይ MV Barima የተባለ የሳንቲም መርከብ ቅዳሜ ዕለት በመገለባበጡ ብዙ ሰዎች የጠፉ ሲሆን የሞቱ ሰዎችም እንደሚኖሩ ተሰግቷል። 67 ሰዎች በሕይወት ቢድኑም፣ የመንገደኞች ዝርዝር ትክክለኛ ባለመሆኑ ከተዘገበው በላይ ብዙ ሰዎች በመርከቡ ላይ እንደነበሩ ተገምቷል። መንግሥት የመርከቧ ካፒቴን እና ሠራተኞች በአደንዛዥ እፅ ምርመራው አዎንታዊ ሆነው በመገኘታቸው በቁጥጥር ስር ውለዋል፣ እንዲሁም ድርጊቱ በቸልተኝነት የተፈጠረ መሆኑን ለማረጋገጥ ምርመራ እየተካሄደ ነው።
oromo: Guyana keessatti dooniin imaltootaa MV Barima jedhamu tokko erga gombifamee booda namoonni hedduun badaniiru lubbuun isaaniis darbeera jedhamee sodaatama. Namoonni 67 lubbuun kan ooran yoo ta'u, maqaan imaltootaa galmaa'e dhugaa waan hin taaneef, namoonni meeqa akka jiranii fi akka miidhaman mirkaneeffachuun rakkisaa ta'eera. Qondaaltonni biyyattii gitaa fi hojjettoota isaa qorannoo qoricha sammuu hadoochuun booda qabaniiru, akkasumas balaan kun tuffii fi hanqina hojii irraa kan dhufe ta'uu isaa qorachuuf qorannoon eegalameera.

title: Petro to give farewell speech amid Colombia transfer-of-power tensions
english: Outgoing Colombian President Gustavo Petro is preparing to deliver a final farewell address during nationwide protests scheduled for Independence Day. These demonstrations coincide with ongoing disputes regarding the integrity of last month’s close election, which Petro claims was compromised by foreign interference. Additionally, a disagreement has emerged regarding the inauguration site for the president-elect, as Petro has blocked plans to hold the ceremony at a military base.
amharic: የኮሎምቢያው ወጪ ፕሬዝዳንት ጉስታቮ ፔትሮ በነጻነት ቀን በሚካሄድ ሀገራዊ የተቃውሞ ሰልፍ ላይ የመሰናበቻ ንግግር ለማድረግ ተዘጋጅተዋል። እነዚህ ተቃውሞዎች ባለፈው ወር የተካሄደውን አወዛጋቢ ምርጫ ውጤት በመቃወም እና የምርጫውን ሂደት በውጭ ጣልቃ ገብነት የተበላሸ ነው በሚል የሚካሄዱ ናቸው። በሌላ በኩል ፔትሮ ተመራጩ ፕሬዝዳንት ሥልጣኑን በወታደራዊ ካምፕ እንዲረከቡ ያቀረቡትን ጥያቄ ውድቅ በማድረግ፣ የሥልጣን ሽግግሩ በፓርላማ መከናወን እንዳለበት አጥብቀው ተቃውመዋል።
oromo: Pirezedantiin Kolombiyaa aangoo gadi lakkisaa jiran Gustaavoo Peetiroo, guyyaa walabaa biyyattii irratti hiriira gaggeeffamu irratti haasaa gaggeessaa gochuuf qophaa'aa jiru. Hiriirri kun kan qophaa'e filannoo ji'a darbe gaggeeffame irratti shakkiin walqabatee fi mootummaan Peetiroo filannicha keessa harka galchituu biyya alaa jiraachuu akka jiru amanuun walqabatee dha. Akkasumas, pirezedantiin haaraan aangoo fudhatan eebba isaanii buufata waraanaa keessatti gaggeeffachuuf karoorfatanii turan yoo ta'u, Peetiroo akkaataa seeraa qabatee eebbi kun mana maree keessatti akka raawwatamu ajajuun mormanii jiru.

title: Israeli ministers and settlers call for return to Gaza settlements
english: A large group of Israeli settlers, government ministers, and lawmakers gathered near the Gaza border to advocate for the re-establishment of Jewish settlements in the territory. This demonstration highlights a growing political movement within Israel that supports retaking and resettling the area. The event underscores the intensifying debate regarding the future control and presence of Israelis in Gaza.
amharic: የእስራኤል ሰፋሪዎች፣ የመንግስት ሚኒስትሮች እና የፓርላማ አባላት በጋዛ ድንበር አቅራቢያ በመሰባሰብ በአካባቢው የሰፈራ ፕሮግራሞችን እንደገና እንዲጀምሩ ጥሪ አቅርበዋል። ይህ ሰልፍ በእስራኤል ፖለቲካ ውስጥ ጋዛን መልሶ ለመያዝ እና ሰዎችን ለማስፈር እየጨመረ የመጣውን እንቅስቃሴ የሚያሳይ ነው። ድርጊቱ በአካባቢው የወደፊት ዕጣ ፈንታ እና በእስራኤላውያን መገኘት ዙሪያ ያለውን ውዝግብ ይበልጥ አባብሶታል።
oromo: Hiriirri guddaan kan gaggeeffame yoo ta'u, keessattuu namoonni biyyee fudhatanii qubataniifi ministiroonni mootummaa Israa'el Gazaatti deebi'anii qubachuuf gaaffii dhiyeessaniiru. Sochiin kun siyaasa Israa'el keessatti bakka sanatti deebi'anii qubachuuf fedhiin jiru dabalaa akka dhufe kan agarsiisuudha. Gochi kun gara fuulduraatti bulchiinsa Gazaafi qubannaa Israa'elii irratti mariin jiru caalaatti akka cimaa dhufe kan mirkaneessudha.

title: Burnham’s move to scrap UK’s digital ID plans earns cheers and criticism
english: New UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham has officially canceled the country's controversial digital ID program, known as BritCard. While the government will continue to digitize public services, it has abandoned the universal identification scheme due to significant public opposition and high implementation costs. The billions of pounds originally earmarked for the project will now be redirected to address the cost-of-living crisis for citizens.
amharic: የእንግሊዝ አዲሱ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አንዲ በርንሃም ብሪትካርድ በመባል የሚታወቀውን አወዛጋቢ የዲጂታል መታወቂያ ፕሮግራም በይፋ ሰርዘዋል። መንግስት የህዝብ አገልግሎቶችን በዲጂታል መንገድ ማዘመኑን ቢቀጥልም፣ በህዝብ ተቃውሞ እና በከፍተኛ ወጪ ምክንያት አጠቃላይ የዲጂታል መታወቂያ እቅዱን ትቶታል። ለዚህ ፕሮግራም ተመድቦ የነበረው በቢሊዮኖች የሚቆጠር ገንዘብ ለኑሮ ውድነት መፍትሄ ወደ መስጠት ተግባራት እንዲዛወር ተወስኗል።
oromo: Mummichi Ministeeraa UK haaraan Andy Burnham sagantaa waraqaa eenyummaa dijitaala kan BritCard jedhamu fi mormii guddaa kaase ture haqeera. Mootummaan tajaajiloota mootummaa dijitaalatti jijjiiruu itti fufuus, mormii uummataa fi baasii guddaa irraa kan ka'e qophii eenyummaa dijitaala waliigalaa kana dhaabeera. Maallaqni biliyoonaan lakkaa'amu kan pirojektichaaf ramadamee ture, ammayyuu rakkoo gatii jireenyaa hir’isuuf akka oolu murtaa'eera.

title: Why Palestinians in Gaza are celebrating Spain’s World Cup win
english: Many Palestinians in Gaza came together to watch the World Cup final and cheered for Spain's victory. They chose to support the Spanish team as a sign of gratitude for Spain's stance regarding the ongoing conflict in Gaza. This celebration served as a public expression of appreciation for the country's perceived solidarity with their cause.
amharic: በጋዛ የሚገኙ በርካታ ፍልስጤማውያን የዓለም ዋንጫን ፍጻሜ ለመመልከት ተሰባስበው ለስፔን አሸናፊነት ድጋፋቸውን ሰጥተዋል። የስፔን ቡድንን የደገፉትም በጋዛ እየተካሄደ ባለው ጦርነት ወቅት አገሪቱ ለፍልስጤማውያን ላሳየችው አቋም ያላቸውን ምስጋና ለመግለጽ ነው። ይህ ድጋፍ አገሪቱ ለችግራቸው ላሳየችው አጋርነት ያላቸውን አድናቆት የሚያንጸባርቅ ነበር።
oromo: Palestinoonni Gaazaa keessa jiraatan hedduun tapha xumuraa Waancaa Addunyaa waliin hordofuun injifannoo Ispeen gammachuun simataniiru. Ispeen waraana Gaazaa keessatti geggeeffamaa jiru ilaalchisee dhaabbannoo isheen qabduuf galata galchuuf jecha garee biyyattii deggeraniiru. Gammachuun kun, biyyattiin rakkoo isaanii hubachuun waan isaan cina dhaabbatteef kan isaan qalbii isaanii ibsataniidha.

title: Who is Khalil al-Hayya, Hamas’s newly elected political chief?
english: Hamas has appointed Khalil al-Hayya as its new political leader following the death of former chief Yahya Sinwar. Al-Hayya, a long-time negotiator and senior official, was selected by the group's Shura Council to lead until the next electoral cycle in 2027. His appointment maintains the organization's internal structure for balancing regional leadership across Gaza, the West Bank, and the diaspora.
amharic: ሃማስ የቀድሞ መሪውን ያህያ ሲንዋርን መገደል ተከትሎ ካሊል አል-ሃያን አዲሱ የፖለቲካ ቢሮ ኃላፊ አድርጎ መርጧል። ለረጅም ጊዜ በድርጅቱ ውስጥ በከፍተኛ ቦታዎች ላይ የቆዩት አል-ሃያ፣ በቡድኑ የሹራ ምክር ቤት ተመርጠው እስከ 2027 ድረስ እንዲመሩ ተወስኗል። ይህ ሹመት ድርጅቱ በጋዛ፣ በምዕራብ ባንክ እና በውጭ የሚገኙ አባላትን ያካተተውን የአመራር መዋቅር ለመጠበቅ ያለመ ነው።
oromo: Hamas hoogganaa isaanii duraanii Yahya Sinwar erga ajjeefamanii booda, Khalil al-Hayyaan geggeessaa biiroo siyaasaa haaraa godhataniiru. Al-Hayyaan gorsaa fi miseensa olaanaa dhaabbatichaa kan turan yoo ta'u, Koreen Shuraa isaan filachuun hanga bara 2027 akka hoogganan murteessaniiru. Filannoon kun caasaa dhaabbatichi bakkeewwan Gaza, West Bank fi alaa walitti fiduuf qabu kan eegsisuudha.

title: Boy, 13, dies during World Cup celebrations in Spain
english: A 13-year-old boy tragically died and two others were injured after a fountain structure collapsed in Spain during celebrations for the national team's World Cup victory. The incident occurred in Ciudad Rodrigo when fans climbed onto the fountain, causing a part of it to break. Local authorities have launched an investigation into the accident and are providing support to the affected families.
amharic: ስፔን የዓለም ዋንጫን በማሸነፏ ምክንያት ደስታቸውን ሲገልጹ የነበሩ የ13 ዓመት ታዳጊ በአሳዛኝ ሁኔታ ህይወቱ አልፏል። በሲውዳድ ሮድሪጎ ከተማ ደጋፊዎች በውኃ ማጠራቀሚያ ገንዳ (ፋውንቴን) ላይ በመውጣታቸው መዋቅሩ በመፍረሱ ሁለት ሌሎች ሰዎችም ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። የአካባቢው ባለስልጣናት በአደጋው ላይ ምርመራ እየጀመሩ ሲሆን ለተጎጂው ቤተሰቦች አስፈላጊውን ድጋፍ እያደረጉ ይገኛል።
oromo: Ispeeniin mo'achuu waancaa addunyaatiin walqabatee gammachuu isaanii ibsachaa kan turan dargaggoon umuriin isaanii waggaa 13 ta'e tokko balaa mudateen lubbuun darbeera. Magaala Siwudaad Rodirigoo keessatti, namoonni gammachuu isaanii ibsachuuf koraa bishaanirratti ba'anii turan keessaa qaamni koraa sun jigeetiin namoonni biroo lama miidhamaniiru. Aangeyyonni naannichaa balaa kana ilaalchisee qorannoo eegaleera akkasumas maatii miidhaan irra ga'eef deeggarsa barbaachisu gochaa jiru.

title: Trump says US strikes hit Iran in 'honour' of American soldiers killed
english: President Trump announced that recent U.S. military strikes against Iran were conducted to honor three American soldiers who were recently killed in Iraq and Jordan. The U.S. military has targeted various Iranian military facilities and communication networks to curb attacks on vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. In retaliation, Iran has launched its own strikes in the region, leading to a tense cycle of military activity that threatens regional shipping routes.
amharic: ፕሬዚዳንት ትራምፕ በኢራን ላይ የተፈጸሙት የአሜሪካ ጥቃቶች በቅርቡ በኢራቅ እና በዮርዳኖስ ለተገደሉ ሶስት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች መታሰቢያ እንደሆኑ ተናግረዋል። አሜሪካ በሆርሙዝ ባህር ላይ የሚደረጉ ጥቃቶችን ለመግታት የኢራንን ወታደራዊ ጣቢያዎች እና የመገናኛ መረቦች ኢላማ አድርጋለች። በምላሹም ኢራን በክልሉ ውስጥ የራሷን ጥቃት የከፈተች ሲሆን ይህም በቀጣናው የንግድ መርከቦች ላይ ስጋት የፈጠረ የሁለቱ ሀገራት ግጭት እንዲቀጥል አድርጓል።
oromo: Pirezidaanti Tiraamp, tarkaanfiin waraanaa Amerikaan Iiraan irratti fudhatte ajjeechaa loltoota Amerikaa sadii kanneen dhiyeenya Iiraaq fi Yoordaanos keessatti ajjeefamaniif yaadannoo ta'uu ibsaniiru. Ameerikaan rakkoo dooniiwwan irratti Hormuz keessatti mudatu hir'isuuf jecha buufataalee waraanaa fi sagalee qaxxaamuraa Iiraan irratti xiyyeeffattee rukuttee jirti. Iiraan gama ishiitiin tarkaanfii deebii kenniteen, walitti bu'iinsi biyyoota lamaanii kun naannichatti nageenya dooniiwwanii fi walitti dhufeenya biyyootaa irratti sodaa uumee jira.

title: Why is Iran bombing Gulf states while avoiding US naval assets and Israel?
english: Iran is currently attacking civilian and military infrastructure in Gulf nations rather than engaging directly with U.S. naval forces or Israel. Analysts believe Tehran is using this strategy to pressure the U.S. administration while avoiding a potentially devastating direct military retaliation from American naval fleets. Iran justifies these strikes by claiming that these neighboring countries are facilitating U.S. military operations, a claim that Gulf states consistently deny.
amharic: ኢራን ከአሜሪካ የባህር ኃይል ወይም ከእስራኤል ጋር በቀጥታ ከመጋጨት ይልቅ በባህረ ሰላጤው አገራት በሚገኙ ሲቪል እና ወታደራዊ መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ ጥቃት እየሰነዘረች ነው። ይህ ስልት በአሜሪካ ላይ ጫና ለመፍጠር ያለመ ቢሆንም፣ ከባህር ኃይል ጋር የሚደረግ ቀጥተኛ ግጭት የሚያስከትለውን ከፍተኛ አደጋ ለመሸሽ ታስቦ የተዘጋጀ እንደሆነ ተንታኞች ይገልጻሉ። ኢራን እነዚህን ጥቃቶች የምታጸድቀው ጎረቤት አገራቱ የአሜሪካን ወታደራዊ እንቅስቃሴዎች እያመቻቹ ነው በሚል ክስ ነው፤ ሆኖም አገራቱ ይህንን ውንጀላ ውድቅ አድርገውታል።
oromo: Iraan humnoota galaana Ameerikaa ykn Israa'el wajjin kallattiin walitti bu'uu irra, biyyoota naannoo Ganaatti miidhaa buufataalee waraanaa fi siivilii irratti xiyyeeffachaa jirti. Akka xiinxaltootatti, mala kana kan fayyadamtuuf dhiibbaa mootummaa Ameerikaa irratti uumuuf yoo ta'u, haleellaa diinagdee fi lola kallattii humnoota galaana Ameerikaa irraa dhufuu danda'u irraa of qusachuufi. Iraan haleellaa kana kanneen raawwattu biyyoonni ollaas kunneen hojii waraanaa Ameerikaa deeggaru jedhee himachuun yoo ta'u, biyyoonni naannichaa himannaa kana guutummaatti haalaniiru.

title: Photos: Police fire tear gas at India’s Cockroach movement supporters
english: Protesters from the youth-led Cockroach Janta Party clashed with police in New Delhi while marching toward Parliament to demand the resignation of India's education minister. The movement, which uses satire to address issues like recent government exam leaks and youth unemployment, has grown significantly in response to these systemic failures. Demonstrators are now calling for major reforms to the testing process and justice for students affected by the recent scandals.
amharic: በህንድ ዋና ከተማ ኒው ዴልሂ የ'ኮክሮች ጃንታ ፓርቲ' አባላት የሆኑ ወጣቶች የትምህርት ሚኒስትሩ ስልጣናቸውን እንዲለቁ በመጠየቅ ወደ ፓርላማ ሊዘምቱ ሲሞክሩ ከፖሊስ ጋር ተጋጭተዋል። ይህ የወጣቶች ንቅናቄ በመንግስት ፈተናዎች ላይ የተከሰተውን የስርቆት ወንጀል እና የስራ አጥነት ችግርን በመቃወም ተቃውሞ እያሰሙ ይገኛሉ። ተቃዋሚዎቹ የፈተና አሰጣጥ ስርዓቱ እንዲሻሻል እና ለተጎዱ ተማሪዎች ተገቢው ካሳ እንዲሰጥ እየጠየቁ ነው።
oromo: Indiyaa, magaalaa Niiu Deelhiitti gareen dargaggootaa 'Cockroach Janta Party' jedhamu, ministeerri barnootaa aangoo gadhiisuu qaba jechuun gara mana maree biyyattiitti imaluu yaalanii poolisii waliin walitti bu'an. Sochii kana kan uumaniif rakkoo qormaata mootummaa fi dhabeeyyii ta'uu isaanii erga ta'ee as, mootummaan jijjiirama cimaa akka fidu gaafataa jiru. Dargaggoonni kun sirni qormaataa akka fooyya'u fi barattoota miidhamanifis haqni akka argamuuf iyyata isaanii dhageessisaa jiru.

title: ‘I go with a smile’ says outgoing UK PM Keir Starmer in final speech
english: Keir Starmer has officially stepped down as the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom, stating that he feels his mission is complete. In his farewell address in London, he expressed that he is leaving his position with a sense of satisfaction. Andy Burnham has been appointed as the new leader of the Labour Party and will succeed Starmer as the country's Prime Minister.
amharic: ኬር ስታርመር የተባበሩት መንግሥታት የጠቅላይ ሚኒስትርነት ሥልጣናቸውን በይፋ ለቀዋል። በለንደን ባደረጉት የመሰናበቻ ንግግር፣ የተጣለባቸውን ኃላፊነት በመወጣታቸው ደስተኛ እንደሆኑ ገልጸዋል። አንዲ በርንሃም የሌበር ፓርቲ አዲሱ መሪ በመሆን የስታርመርን ቦታ በመረከብ አዲሱ የሀገሪቱ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሆነዋል።
oromo: Keir Starmer pirezidaantii biyya Ingiliz ta'uudhaan hojii isaa xumureera. Innis Londonitti haasawaa gaggeessaa godheen, hojiin isaa guutummaatti xumuramuu isaa fi gammachuu guddaadhaan aangoo gadhiisuu isaa ibseera. Andy Burnham hoogganaa haaraa paartii Labour ta'uun, bakka Starmer bu'uun pirezidaantii biyyattii ta'ee muudameera.

title: Hamas names Khalil al-Hayya as new leader after run-off with Khaled Meshaal
english: Hamas has officially appointed Khalil al-Hayya as its new leader following an internal vote. He secured the position after a run-off against former leader Khaled Meshaal. Al-Hayya replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by the Israeli military in Gaza in October 2024.
amharic: ሀማስ ካሊል አል-ሃያን አዲሱ መሪው አድርጎ መርጧል። ይህ ውሳኔ የተላለፈው በቀድሞው መሪ ካሊድ መሻል ላይ በውስጥ ምርጫ ካሸነፉ በኋላ ነው። አል-ሃያ የካቲት 2017 እ.ኤ.አ በእስራኤል ጦር ከተገደሉት ያህያ ሲንዋር በመተካት ነው ይህንን ኃላፊነት የተረከቡት።
oromo: Hamas hoogganaa haaraa isaa godhatee Khalil al-Hayya filateera. Inni kun kan filatame hogganaa duraanii Khaled Meshaal waliin sagalee kenniinsa keessa darbee injifateen boodadha. Al-Hayya bakka Yahya Sinwar kan bara 2024 waraana Israa'eliin ajjeefame bu'ee bakka bu'eera.

title: Jubilation in Spain as La Roja beat Argentina to win second World Cup title
english: Spain celebrated a major victory after defeating Argentina 1-0 during extra time to claim their second World Cup title. Fans across the country took to the streets to mark the win with fireworks and celebrations following the decisive goal by Ferran Torres. The atmosphere remained inclusive in towns like Castelldefels, where local fans and a large Argentinian community watched the match together in honor of Lionel Messi’s long-standing connection to the area.
amharic: ስፔን አርጀንቲናን 1-0 በሆነ ውጤት በጭማሪ ደቂቃ በማሸነፍ ለሁለተኛ ጊዜ የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸናፊ ሆናለች። ይህ ድል መላው ስፔንን በአደባባይ ደስታን እንዲገልጹ ያደረገ ሲሆን፣ የፌራን ቶሬስ ብቸኛ ግብ ለድሉ በቂ ሆናለች። በካስቴልዴፌልስ ከተማ የሚኖሩ የስፔን ደጋፊዎች እና የአርጀንቲና ስደተኞች ሊዮኔል ሜሲ ላላቸው ታሪካዊ ትስስር ክብር ሲባል ጨዋታውን በጋራ በመመልከት አብረው አሳልፈዋል።
oromo: Ispeeniin Arjentiinaa 1-0 yeroo dabalataa irratti injifachuun marsaa lammaffaaf waancaa addunyaa fudhattee jirti. Injifannoo kana booda lammiileen Ispeen karaa irratti ba'uun gammachuu isaanii ibsatanii jiru; galchiin Ferraan Tooresis injifannoo kanaaf murteessaa ture. Magaalaa Kaasteldefeels keessatti, deggertoonni Ispeenii fi aadaa Arjentiinaa kanneen achi jiraatan, hariiroo cimaa Liinoonel Mesii naannicha waliin qabu kabajuuf jechuun taphicha waliin ilaaluun gammachuu isaanii waliin qooddatanii jiru.

title: Top feel-good moments to remember now that the 2026 World Cup is over
english: Despite various controversies and logistical challenges, the 2026 World Cup featured several heartwarming highlights. Notable moments included Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha reuniting with his mother in the US after officials waived her travel fees and young Keyne Yamal capturing hearts with his exuberant celebrations alongside his brother Lamine. These uplifting stories have become the lasting memories of the six-week tournament held across North America.
amharic: የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ በተለያዩ ውዝግቦች እና ፈታኝ ሁኔታዎች የታጀበ ቢሆንም፣ ብዙ አዎንታዊ ገጽታዎችንም አስተናግዷል። ከነዚህም መካከል የኬፕ ቨርዴው ግብ ጠባቂ ቮዚንሃ እናቱ ወደ አሜሪካ መጥተው እንዲያዩት መደረጉ እንዲሁም የላሚን ያማል ታናሽ ወንድም ኬኔ በሜዳ ላይ ያሳያቸው ደስ የሚሉ እንቅስቃሴዎች በሰዎች ዘንድ የማይረሱ ሆነዋል። በሰሜን አሜሪካ ለስድስት ሳምንታት ሲካሄድ የቆየው ይህ ውድድር፣ ከነበሩት ችግሮች ይልቅ በእነዚህ ልብ የሚነኩ ክስተቶች ይታወሳል።
oromo: Waliin gahuun qophii Waancaa Addunyaa bara 2026 rakkoolee fi walitti bu'iinsa garaagaraa keessa kan darbe ta'us, yeroo gammachiisaa fi miira namaa tuqan qabaateera. Keessattuu, eegduun balbala Kaap Verde Vozinha haadha isaa waliin wal arguun isaanii fi obboleessi Lamine Yamal kan ta'e mucaan xiqqoon Keyne, dirree irratti gochaan inni raawwate addunyaa booji'uu danda'eera. Taphoonni kunneen rakkoolee ijoo ta'an hunda hirreeffachuun, ayyaanni kun sammuu namoota hedduu keessatti akka yeroo yaadatamuu qabuutti hafeera.

title: LIVE: Andy Burnham to become UK PM, deliver first speech at 10 Downing
english: Andy Burnham is set to become the next Prime Minister of the United Kingdom, succeeding Keir Starmer. As the leader of the Labour Party, he will be the seventh person to hold this office in the last ten years. His administration plans to prioritize improving public services and addressing the current cost-of-living challenges faced by citizens.
amharic: አንዲ በርንሃም የዩናይትድ ኪንግደም ቀጣዩ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር በመሆን ኬይር ስታርመርን ይተካሉ። የሌበር ፓርቲ መሪ የሆኑት በርንሃም ባለፉት አስር ዓመታት ውስጥ ሰባተኛው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ይሆናሉ። አዲሱ መንግሥት የሕዝብ አገልግሎቶችን በማሻሻል እና በዜጎች ላይ እየደረሰ ያለውን የኑሮ ውድነት ችግር ለመፍታት ትኩረት ሰጥቶ እንደሚሠራ አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Andii Barnhaam Kayer Staarmer bakka bu'uun ministira muummee biyya Ingiliz itti aanu ta'uuf qophiirra jiru. Hogganaan paartii Leebar kun waggaa kudhan darban keessatti namoota torbaffa ta'uun aangoo kan qabataniidha. Mootummaan isaanii tajaajila hawaasummaa fooyyeessuufi rakkoo gatiin jireenyaa dabaluun ummata mudate furuuf xiyyeeffannoo kennuuf karoorfateera.

title: Rubio: US ‘open to diplomacy’ after ninth night of bombing Iran
english: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio stated that the United States remains willing to pursue diplomatic channels following nine consecutive nights of military strikes against Iran. These attacks have intensified following the confirmed deaths of three American soldiers during regional retaliatory actions. Despite the ongoing military campaign, the administration maintains that a peaceful resolution is still a possibility.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር ማርኮ ሩቢዮ፣ አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ ለዘጠኝ ተከታታይ ምሽቶች ወታደራዊ ጥቃት ብትሰነዝርም በዲፕሎማሲያዊ መንገድ ችግሮችን ለመፍታት ዝግጁ መሆኗን ገልጸዋል። ይህ ጥቃት የተፈጸመው በክልሉ በተከሰተ የአጸፋ እርምጃ ሶስት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ከተገደሉ በኋላ ነው። አሜሪካ ወታደራዊ እርምጃውን ብትቀጥልም፣ በድርድር መፍትሄ ለማምጣት ያላት ፍላጎት እንዳልተቀየረ ታውቋል።
oromo: Ministirri Dhimma Alaa Ameerikaa Marko Ruubiyoo, Ameerikaan halkan saglaffaadhaaf Iiraan irratti haleellaa rawwattee iyyuu, rakkinicha karaa dippilomaasiin furuuf fedhii qabaachuu ishee ibsaniiru. Haleellaan kun kan hammaate, haleellaa deebii naannicha keessatti rawwatameen loltoonni Ameerikaa sadii erga du'anii boodadha. Ameerikaan haleellaa waraanaa kanas kan itti fufte ta'us, furmaatni nagaa har'as akka jiru ibsiteetti.

title: Key takeaways from the World Cup 2026 final as Spain beat Argentina
english: Spain secured the 2026 World Cup title after defeating Argentina 1-0 in an intense extra-time match. The Spanish team relied on superior ball possession to control the pace of the game and effectively neutralized Lionel Messi's influence throughout the final. This victory cements Spain's current dominance in world football, as they now hold the World Cup, the Euros, and the Olympic titles simultaneously.
amharic: ስፔን አርጀንቲናን 1 ለ 0 በሆነ ውጤት ተጨማሪ የጨዋታ ጊዜ በማሸነፍ የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸናፊ ሆናለች። የስፔን ብሔራዊ ቡድን የኳስ ቁጥጥር ብልጫን በመጠቀም ጨዋታውን መቆጣጠር የቻሉ ሲሆን ሊዮኔል ሜሲን በውጤታማነት መገደብ ችለዋል። ይህ ድል ስፔን አሁን በአንድ ጊዜ የዓለም ዋንጫ፣ የአውሮፓ ዋንጫ እና የኦሊምፒክ የወርቅ ሜዳሊያ ባለቤት በመሆን በዓለም እግር ኳስ ያላትን የበላይነት አረጋግጣለች።
oromo: Ispeeniin arjentiinaa 1-0 xumura tapha irratti erga injifattee booda, qophii bara 2026 kan ta'e Waancaa Addunyaa injifatteetti. Taphattoonni Ispeen kubbaa to'achuun taphicha hogganuu fi kilabii arjentiinaa keessatti Li'oonel Mesii daangessuun injifannoo argatan. Ispeeniin amma waancaa addunyaa, waancaa Yuurooppii fi medalii olompikii waliin harkatti galchuun, idil-addunyaatti sadarkaa olaanaa irra akka jirtu mirkaneessiteetti.

title: Photos: Spain beat Argentina to win second World Cup title
english: Spain secured their second World Cup title by defeating Argentina 1-0 in a tense final held in New Jersey. The decisive goal was scored by Ferran Torres during extra time, shortly after Argentina was reduced to ten players following Enzo Fernandez's red card. Despite a strong defensive effort by Argentina, Spain’s superior performance and tactical control allowed them to claim the trophy.
amharic: ስፔን በአሜሪካ በተካሄደው የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ አርጀንቲናን 1-0 በማሸነፍ ሁለተኛውን ዋንጫ ማንሳት ችላለች። የጨዋታው ብቸኛ ግብ በጭማሪ ሰዓት በፌራን ቶሬስ የተቆጠረች ሲሆን፣ አርጀንቲና በኢንዞ ፈርናንዴዝ የቀይ ካርድ ምክንያት በሜዳ ላይ አስር ተጫዋቾች ብቻ ቀርተው ነበር። ምንም እንኳን አርጀንቲና ጠንካራ የመከላከል ብቃት ብታሳይም፣ ስፔን የላቀ የጨዋታ ብቃት በማሳየት የዓለም ዋንጫውን ማሸነፍ ችላለች።
oromo: Ispeeniin tapha xumuraa Waancaa Addunyaa Niiw Jarsii irratti geggeeffame irratti Arjantiinaa 1-0 injifachuun waancaa isaanii lammaffaa fudhataniiru. Galchiin murteessaan kun yeroo dabalataa irratti Ferraan Tooresiin kan galfame yoo ta'u, kana dura taphataan Arjantiinaa Enzoo Fernaandez kaardii diimaa argatee ergame ture. Arjantiinaan ittisa cimaa godhuu kan yaalte ta'us, ispeeniin tapha isaanii irratti aangoo qabaachuu fi dandeettii olaanaa agarsiisuun injifannoo argachuu danda'aniiru.

title: Food delivery rider wins China's top literary prize
english: Wang Jibing, a 56-year-old food delivery rider in China, has won the prestigious Lu Xun Literary Prize for his poetry collection titled Low Flight. Drawing inspiration from his daily experiences and interviews with fellow workers, his writing sheds light on the realities of the gig economy. Despite this major achievement, Wang remains humble and intends to continue his delivery work, maintaining his down-to-earth lifestyle.
amharic: በቻይና የቤት ለቤት ምግብ አድራሽ የሆኑት የ56 ዓመቱ ዋንግ ጂቢንግ፣ 'ሎው ፍላይት' በተሰኘው የግጥም ስብስባቸው ከፍተኛውን የሉ ሹን የሥነ-ጽሑፍ ሽልማት አሸንፈዋል። ግጥሞቻቸው በዕለት ተዕለት የሥራ ልምዳቸው እና ከሌሎች ሠራተኞች ጋር ባደረጓቸው ቃለ መጠይቆች ላይ የተመሠረቱ ሲሆን፣ የዘመናዊው የጊግ ኢኮኖሚ ተግዳሮቶችን በግልጽ ያሳያሉ። ይህ ትልቅ ክብር ቢሰጣቸውም፣ ዋንግ አሁንም የሥራ ህይወታቸውን ለመቀጠል እና ቀላል ኑሯቸውን ለመምራት መርጠዋል።
oromo: Chaayinaa keessatti namni nyaata geejjibsiisu Wang Jibing jedhamu, walaloo isaa 'Low Flight' jedhamuun badhaasa ogbarruu guddaa Lu Xun jedhamu injifateera. Walaloon isaa kun muuxannoo isaa guyyuu fi hojjettoota biroo waliin marii godhe irratti kan hundaa'e yoo ta'u, rakkoo hojiiwwan yeroo ammaa keessa jiru ifa baasa. Badhaasicha argatus, Wang akkaataa jireenya isaa isa salphaa fi hojii geejjibsiisuu isaa itti fufuuf murteesseera.

title: Protests continue in Houston over ICE killing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo
english: Hundreds of protesters in Houston marched to demand justice following the fatal shooting of 52-year-old Mexican national Lorenzo Salgado Araujo by an ICE agent. While authorities claimed the officer acted in self-defense, witnesses have disputed this account, and government statements have not confirmed the official narrative. The incident has intensified public anger over US immigration enforcement tactics, leading to calls for further demonstrations and systemic investigations.
amharic: በሂዩስተን ከተማ በኢሚግሬሽን እና ጉምሩክ ባለስልጣን (ICE) ወኪል የተገደለውን የ52 ዓመት የሜክሲኮ ዜጋ ሎሬንዞ ሳልጋዶ አራውጆን ፍትህ በመጠየቅ በመቶዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰልፈኞች ተቃውሞ አሰምተዋል። ባለስልጣናት ግድያው የተፈጸመው ራሱን ለመከላከል በሚል ቢናገሩም፣ የአይን እማኞች ግን የዚህን አባባል ተቃርነዋል። ይህ ክስተት በስደተኞች ላይ የሚደረገውን ጥብቅ አያያዝ በመቃወም በከተማዋ ሰፊ ተቃውሞዎችን አስነስቷል።
oromo: Hundeedda namoota magaalaa Hiyustonitti walgahaniin, lammii Meksikoo umrii 52 kan ta'an Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, jala bultii jila ICE tiin ajjeefamuun isaanii mormanii jiru. Mootummaan ajjeechaan kun of-irraa ittisuuf kan raawwatame yoo jedhu, ragaan argan garuu yaada kana mormuudhaan shakkiin akka jiru ibsan. Gochi kun siyaasa godaantota irratti fudhatamu kan morman namoota hedduu biratti aarii guddaa kan uume yoo ta'u, mormiinis itti fufee jira.

title: Trump: Latest strikes on Iran ‘in honour’ of killed US military personnel
english: President Donald Trump confirmed that the US has continued military strikes against Iran for nine straight days. These operations are intended as a tribute to the American troops who lost their lives in Iraq and Jordan. Since the start of the conflict, 17 US service members have been killed and over 420 have sustained injuries.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ ለዘጠኝ ተከታታይ ቀናት ወታደራዊ ጥቃቶችን ማድረሷን አረጋግጠዋል። እነዚህ ጥቃቶች በኢራቅ እና በዮርዳኖስ ሕይወታቸው ላለፈው የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች መታሰቢያ እንደሆኑ ተገልጿል። የግጭቱ መጀመሪያ አንስቶ እስካሁን ድረስ 17 የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ሲገደሉ ከ420 በላይ የሚሆኑት ደግሞ ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል።
oromo: Pireezidaant Doolaard Traamp tarkaanfiin waraanaa Ameerikaan Iraan irratti guyyoota sagal walitti aansuun fudhatte, loltoota Ameerikaa Iraaq fi Yordaanos keessatti du'aniif kabaja argisiisuuf akka ta'e ibsaniiru. Waraanni kun eegalamee kaasee, loltoonni Ameerikaa 17 ta'an ajjeefamanii, namoonni 420 ol ta'an ammoo miidhaan irra ga'eera.

title: US releases footage of ninth consecutive night of strikes on Iran
english: The United States military has conducted airstrikes against Iranian targets for the ninth night in a row. According to CENTCOM, these operations focused on destroying air defense systems, command centers, and missile launch sites. The campaign also targeted surveillance and communication networks to weaken Iran's maritime and military capabilities.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል በኢራን ላይ ለተከታታይ ዘጠነኛው ምሽት የአየር ድብደባ ፈጽሟል። የአሜሪካ ማዕከላዊ ዕዝ (CENTCOM) እንደገለጸው፣ ጥቃቱ የኢራንን የአየር መከላከያ ሥርዓቶች፣ ወታደራዊ የትእዛዝ ማዕከላት እና የሚሳኤል ማስወንጨፊያ ጣቢያዎችን ኢላማ ያደረገ ነበር። በተጨማሪም የኢራንን የባህር ኃይል እና የኮሙዩኒኬሽን አቅም ለማዳከም የታቀዱ ተግባራት ተካሂደዋል።
oromo: Humnoonni waraana Ameerikaa halkanii halkan tattaaffii saglan dura eegalameef Iran irratti haleellaa qilleensa irraa gaggeessaa jiru. Akka gabaasa CENTCOM-tti, haleellaan kun buufata ajajaa, sirnoota ittisa qilleensaa fi iddoowwan meeshaalee waraanaa Iran caccabsuu irratti xiyyeeffateera. Tarkaanfiin kun dandeettii waraana galaanaa fi quunnamtii Iran laaffisuuf kan yaadame dha.

title: Tearful Scaloni uncertain of Argentina future after World Cup loss
english: Following Argentina's loss to Spain in the 2026 World Cup final, head coach Lionel Scaloni expressed uncertainty regarding his future with the team. Although he remains the country's most successful manager, he feels it may be time to step aside as he doubts he can replicate such high-level achievements with a new squad. Scaloni plans to discuss his situation with the federation president after his contract concludes in December.
amharic: እ.ኤ.አ. በ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ አርጀንቲና በስፔን ከተሸነፈች በኋላ የቡድኑ ዋና አሰልጣኝ ሊዮኔል ስካሎኒ ስለወደፊት ቆይታቸው እርግጠኛ እንዳልሆኑ ተናግረዋል። ስካሎኒ በአርጀንቲና ታሪክ ከተሳካላቸው አሰልጣኞች አንዱ ቢሆኑም፣ አዲስ ቡድን በመገንባት እንደቀድሞው ውጤታማ መሆን ስለማይችሉ ስራቸውን ሊለቁ እንደሚችሉ ጠቁመዋል። አሰልጣኙ ኮንትራታቸው በታህሳስ ወር ሲጠናቀቅ ከእግር ኳስ ፌዴሬሽን ፕሬዝዳንት ጋር በመመካከር የመጨረሻ ውሳኔ ላይ እንደሚደርሱ ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Injifannoo xumuraa waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 irratti Ispeen Arjantiinarratti erga galte booda, leenjisaan garee biyyaalessaa Arjantiinaa Lionel Iskaalonii gara fuulduraa isaanii irratti shakkiin akka jiru ibsan. Iskaaloniin leenjisaa biyyattii milkaa'aa ta'an ta'us, garee haarawa ijaaruun injifannoo kanaan dura argame irra deebi'uun akka ulfaatu waan itti dhaga'ameef, hojii isaanii gadhiisuuf yaada qabu. Iskaaloniin kantaraktiin isaanii Muddeetti erga dhumee booda, pirezidaantii federeeshinichaa waliin mari'atanii murtoo dhumaa akka kennan beeksisaniiru.

title: Women’s tennis players must take one-time gene test for eligibility
english: The Women’s Tennis Association has updated its eligibility rules to require all female players to undergo a one-time genetic screening for the SRY gene. This test, which identifies biological sex through a blood or swab sample, replaces the previous policy that focused on testosterone levels. The new mandate aims to standardize entry requirements for professional tournaments starting this year while emphasizing athlete privacy and dignity.
amharic: የሴቶች የቴኒስ ማህበር በሁሉም የቴኒስ ተጫዋቾች ላይ አንድ ጊዜ ብቻ የሚደረግ የዘረመል ምርመራ እንደሚተገበር አስታውቋል። የኤስ.አር.ዋይ (SRY) ጂን ምርመራ በመባል የሚታወቀው ይህ ሂደት የባዮሎጂካል ጾታን ለመለየት በደም ወይም በአፍ ምራቅ ናሙና አማካይነት ይከናወናል። አዲሱ ደንብ ቀደም ሲል የነበረውን የቴስቶስትሮን መጠን የመቆጣጠር መመሪያ በመተካት፣ በዘንድሮው የውድድር ዓመት ተግባራዊ ይሆናል።
oromo: Waldaan Teneesii Dubartootaa (WTA) taphattoonni hundi qormaata jeeneetiksii al tokko qofa ta'e akka fudhatan haala mijeesseera. Qormaanni kun jeeniin SRY jedhamu qaama taphattootaa keessa jiraachuu fi dhabachuu isaa qorachuun saala bioloojiitiin mirkaneessa. Qajeelfamni haaraan kun kan duraan turesse hormoonii qaamaa irratti hundaa'uun taphachuun walqabatu bakka bu'uun, bara kana irraa eegalee dirqama ta'ee hojiirra oola.

title: Bahrain intercepting attacks from Iran
english: Bahrain has activated its air defense systems to counter incoming attacks linked to Iran. Residents in the capital, Manama, reported hearing explosions as warning sirens sounded across the country. Official state media confirmed that the military is actively responding to these hostilities.
amharic: የባህሬን አየር መከላከያ ስርዓቶች ከኢራን የተሰነዘሩ ጥቃቶችን ለመመከት እንዲነቁ ተደርገዋል። በዋና ከተማዋ ማናማ የፍንዳታ ድምፆች መሰማታቸውን ተከትሎ የማስጠንቀቂያ ደወሎች ተሰምተዋል። የመንግስት መገናኛ ብዙሃን የሀገሪቱ ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች ለጥቃቱ ምላሽ እየሰጡ መሆናቸውን አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Bahrainiin weerara Iran irraa ishee irra ga'u ittisuuf sirna ittisa qilleensa ishee hojiirra oolchiteetti. Magaalaa guddittii Maanaamaa keessatti sagaleen dhoohinsaafi sagaleen akeekkachiisaa dhaga'amuu gabaafameera. Miidiyaan mootummaa akka mirkaneessetti, waraanni biyyattii haleellaa kana ittisuuf tarkaanfii fudhachaa jira.

title: Morning update
english: The United States conducted its ninth consecutive night of airstrikes against Iranian military targets in response to the deaths of American service members. Meanwhile, Iran's Revolutionary Guard announced retaliatory attacks in Syria and threats against oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, while a ship fire was reported near Oman. Additionally, tensions in the region remain high following reports that Israeli forces killed two Palestinians in the West Bank.
amharic: አሜሪካ የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች መገደልን ተከትሎ ለተከታታይ ዘጠነኛ ሌሊት በአይራን ወታደራዊ ኢላማዎች ላይ የአየር ድብደባ አድርሳለች። በሌላ በኩል የአይራን አብዮታዊ ዘበኛ በሶሪያ የመልስ ጥቃት እንደፈጸመ እና በሆርሙዝ ስትሬት የነዳጅ ማመላለሻ መርከቦች ላይ ማስፈራሪያ እንዳደረሰ አስታውቋል። በአሁኑ ወቅት በዌስት ባንክ የእስራኤል ኃይሎች በፈጸሙት ጥቃት ሁለት ፍልስጤማውያን መገደላቸውን ተከትሎ በክልሉ ያለው የጸጥታ ውጥረት ተባብሷል።
oromo: Amerikaa du'a loltoota ishee hordofee, halkan saglaffaadhaaf iddoowwan waraana Iraan irratti haleellaa qilleensa irraa raawwatteetti. Gama biraatiin, waardiyan qabsoo Iraan mootummaa Siiriyaa keessatti haleellaa haaloo ba'uu raawwachuu fi karaa galaana Hormuz keessa kan darban dooniiwwan boba'aa irratti doorsisa gochuu ishee beeksifteetti. Kana malees, weeraraan humnoota Israa'el naannoo West Bank keessatti namoota Falasxiin lama ajjeesuu hordofee walitti bu'iinsi naannichaa caalaatti hammaachaa jira.

title: Blasts heard in Bahrain's Manama
english: Residents in Manama, the capital of Bahrain, reported hearing multiple explosions. These sounds occurred immediately after emergency warning sirens began to sound throughout the city. Authorities are currently looking into the cause of the incident.
amharic: የባህሬን ዋና ከተማ በሆነችው ማናማ ውስጥ በርካታ ፍንዳታዎች እንደተሰሙ ተዘግቧል። ድምጾቹ የተሰሙት ከተማዋ ውስጥ የአደጋ ጊዜ ማስጠንቀቂያ ሳይረኖች ከጠሩ በኋላ ወዲያውኑ ነው። የባለስልጣናት አካላት በጉዳዩ ላይ ምርመራ እያደረጉ ነው።
oromo: Magaalaa guddoo Baahireyn kan taate Manaamaa keessatti sagaleen dhukaatii hedduu dhaga'ameera. Sagaleen kun kan dhaga'ame erga sireeniin akeekkachiisaa magaalaatti dhaga'amuu eegalee booda ture. Qaamni dhimmi ilaallatu waa'ee dhimmichaa qorannaa taasisaa jira.

title: Kuwaiti air defences responding to Iranian attacks for a second time
english: Kuwait's military has activated its air defense systems for the second time today to counter incoming attacks from Iran. Officials confirmed that loud noises heard by residents are due to defensive interceptions of hostile objects. The army has advised the public to remain calm and follow all official safety guidelines.
amharic: የኩዌት ወታደራዊ ኃይል ከአየር ላይ የሚሰነዘሩ ጥቃቶችን ለመከላከል የአየር መከላከያ ስርዓቱን ለሁለተኛ ጊዜ አግብሯል። ባለስልጣናት እንደገለፁት የሚሰሙት ፍንዳታዎች የጠላት ኢላማዎችን በመከላከል ሂደት የሚከሰቱ ናቸው። የኩዌት ጦር ህዝቡ ደህንነትን እንዲጠብቅ እና የፀጥታ አካላትን መመሪያ እንዲከተል አሳስቧል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyya Kuweet haleellaa Iran irraa isaan irra ga'u ittisuuf sirna ittisa qilleensaa isaanii yeroo lammaffaaf hojii irra oolchaniiru. Namoonni sagalee dhukaatii dhaga'an kun kan ta'e meeshaalee diinaa qilleensa irra turan ittisuuf jecha akka ta'e aanga'oonni mirkaneessaniiru. Waraanni biyyattii ummanni nagaa isaa akka eeggatu fi qajeelfamoota nageenyaa hordofuuf gorsa kenneera.

title: Iran claims attacks on Kuwait
english: Iran's Revolutionary Guard has announced that it launched drone strikes against American military facilities located at the Ali Al Salem base in Kuwait. According to the report, the attacks resulted in the destruction of a radar system and caused significant fires that damaged drone hangars and aviation supplies. This action represents a direct escalation by Iranian forces against US military infrastructure in the region.
amharic: የኢራን እስላማዊ አብዮታዊ ዘብ በኩዌት በሚገኘው የአሊ አል ሳሌም የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ጣቢያ ላይ በድሮን ጥቃት መፈጸሙን አስታውቋል። በደረሰው ጥቃት የአሜሪካ የራዳር ስርዓት ሙሉ በሙሉ መውደሙን እና የድሮን ማከማቻ ስፍራዎች በእሳት መጎዳታቸውን ተገልጿል። ይህ ክስተት በክልሉ ውስጥ ባሉ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ የኢራን ኃይሎች የወሰዱት ከባድ እርምጃ ተደርጎ ተወስዷል።
oromo: Humnoonni jacha Irraan (IRGC) buufata waraana Ameerikaa kan Kuweetitti argamu, Ali Al Salem irratti haleellaa xiyyaara maleeyyii (drone) gaggeessuu isaanii beeksisaniiru. Haleellaa kanaan radarri waraana Ameerikaa guutummaatti kan barbadaa'e yoo ta'u, bakka xiyyaarri maleeyyii itti kuufamanis miidhaan guddaan irra ga'eera. Gochi kun humnoonni Irraan buufataalee waraana Ameerikaa naannichatti argaman irratti tarkaanfii cimaa fudhachuu isaanii kan agarsiisuudha.

title: How a young and cohesive Spain took down Lionel Messi’s Argentina
english: Spain captured their second World Cup title by defeating Argentina in a dominant final performance held in New Jersey. Led by a talented, youthful squad, the Spanish team remained undefeated throughout the entire tournament while conceding only a single goal. Their victory marked a remarkable turnaround after a shaky start to the competition, showcasing their growth and defensive strength under coach Luis de la Fuente.
amharic: ስፔን በአርጀንቲና ላይ በኒው ጀርሲ በተደረገው የፍፃሜ ጨዋታ ድል በመቀዳጀት ሁለተኛውን የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸንፋለች። በወጣት እና በታላቅ ተሰጥኦ ባላቸው ተጫዋቾች የተገነባው የስፔን ብሔራዊ ቡድን፣ በውድድሩ በሙሉ ሳይሸነፍ አንድ ግብ ብቻ በመቀበል አመርቂ ብቃት አሳይቷል። በውድድሩ መጀመሪያ ላይ የነበረውን አቋም በማሻሻል፣ በአሰልጣኝ ሉዊስ ደ ላ ፈንቴ መሪነት ጠንካራ የመከላከል አቅም በማሳየት የዋንጫው ባለቤት መሆን ችለዋል።
oromo: Ispeeniin Arjentiinaa injifachuun xumura tapha Waancaa Addunyaa Niiw Jarsii irratti taasifame irratti injifannoo argachuun waancaa isa lammaffaa fudhatteetti. Gareen dargaggootaa fi ogummaa olaanaa qabu kun, taphoota hunda keessatti osoo hin injifamin fi goolii tokko qofa erga seensifatee booda moohannoo argateera. Ispeeniin jalqaba taphichaa irratti qormaata ishee mudate mo’uun, leenjisaa Luwiis de la Fuentee jalatti tapha ittisaa cimaa fi sirrii ta’een injifannoo seena qabeessa galmeessiteetti.

title: Andy Burnham to become UK’s PM on Monday: What happens next?
english: Andy Burnham is set to become the 59th Prime Minister of the UK this coming Monday, following the resignation of Keir Starmer. Known as the 'King of the North' from his time as mayor of Greater Manchester, he will formally accept an invitation from King Charles III to form a new government. He faces immediate challenges including high living costs and a slow economy as he transitions back into national leadership.
amharic: ኬይር ስታርመር ከሥልጣን በመልቀቃቸው ምክንያት አንዲ በርንሃም በሚቀጥለው ሰኞ የዩናይትድ ኪንግደም 59ኛው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሆነው ይሾማሉ። የቀድሞው የማንቸስተር ከንቲባ የነበሩት በርንሃም፣ ንጉሥ ቻርለስን በመገናኘት አዲስ መንግሥት እንዲመሠርቱ በይፋ ይጠየቃሉ። የሀገሪቱን የኢኮኖሚ ቀውስ እና የኑሮ ውድነትን መፍታት የአዲሱ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ዋና ተግዳሮቶች ይሆናሉ።
oromo: Andy Burnham guyyaa Wiixataa dhufu kana booda, Keir Starmer aangoo gadi lakkisuun walqabatee, ministira muummee biyya Ingiliz 59ffaa ta'uuf qophiirra jira. Kantiibaa magaalaa Manchester duraanii kan turan kun, mooticha Charles III bira deemanii mootummaa haaraa hundeessuuf afeerama argatu. Burnham gara aangoo biyyattii deebi'anii, rakkina dinagdee fi baasii jireenyaa olka'aa ta'e irratti xiyyeeffannoo kennuuf kan eegamuudha.

title: Africa Shield: Why securing development is becoming a new security priority
english: African nations are increasingly focused on securing chemical, biological, radiological, and nuclear materials as their economies and healthcare sectors expand. During the Africa Shield 2026 workshop in Tunisia, officials discussed the need for better regulation to prevent these essential substances from being stolen or misused. The goal is to support industrial growth and scientific advancement while ensuring these sensitive materials remain protected from criminal or malicious actors.
amharic: የአፍሪካ ሀገራት ኢኮኖሚ እና የጤና ዘርፍ እያደገ በመምጣቱ ኬሚካላዊ፣ ባዮሎጂካዊ እና ራዲዮአክቲቭ ቁሳቁሶችን በአግባቡ መያዝ ቅድሚያ የሚሰጠው ጉዳይ ሆኗል። በቱኒዚያ በተካሄደው የአፍሪካ ሺልድ 2026 ጉባኤ ላይ፣ እነዚህን ስሱ ቁሳቁሶች ከስርቆት እና ከጉዳት ለመጠበቅ የቁጥጥር ሥርዓቶችን ማጠናከር አስፈላጊ እንደሆነ ተወያይተዋል። ዋናው ዓላማ የቴክኖሎጂ እና የኢንዱስትሪ እድገትን ሳይገቱ፣ ለደህንነት ሲባል ቁሳቁሶቹ በተገቢው መንገድ መያዛቸውን ማረጋገጥ ነው።
oromo: Biyyoonni Afrikaa guddina diinagdee fi damee fayyaa isaanii wajjin walqabatee, meeshaalee kemikaala, baayolojii fi raadiyoo-aktiiwii ta'an eeggannoo cimaa gochuuf xiyyeeffannoo kennuutti jiru. Gurmuun 'Africa Shield 2026' jedhamu Tuuniziyaatti marii taasiseen, meeshaaleen kun gara fuula duraatti akka hin hatamne ykn karaa dogoggoraa akka hin oolleef sirna to'annoo cimsuun barbaachisaa ta'uu ibseera. Kaayyoon isaa guddina indaastirii fi qorannoo saayinsii utuu hin daangeessin, meeshaalee akkanaa kana eeggannoo cimaan to'achuu dha.

title: Palestinians celebrate Spain’s World Cup victory
english: People living in Gaza and the West Bank held public celebrations to mark Spain’s recent World Cup victory over Argentina. Crowds gathered in streets and stadiums to watch the match and cheer for the Spanish team. This enthusiastic response was largely driven by gratitude for the Spanish government's ongoing political support for the Palestinian cause.
amharic: በጋዛ እና በዌስት ባንክ የሚኖሩ ፍልስጤማውያን ስፔን አርጀንቲናን በማሸነፍ የዓለም ዋንጫን በመውሰዷ ደስታቸውን በድምቀት ገልጸዋል። በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰዎች በመንገድ እና በስታዲየም በመሰብሰብ ጨዋታውን የተከታተሉ ሲሆን፣ ይህ አድናቆት የመነጨው የስፔን መንግስት ለፍልስጤም ህዝብ ላሳየው የፖለቲካ ድጋፍ ነው።
oromo: Ummanni Gaazaafi Lixaa Baankii jiraatu, Ispeen injifannoo Waancaa Addunyaa Arjentiinaan injifachuushee gammachuudhaan kabajateera. Namoonni hedduun daandiiwwanii fi istaadiyoomiiwwanitti walitti qabamuudhaan taphicha hordofaniiru. Deeggarsi kun kan maddes, mootummaan Ispeen gama siyaasaan deeggarsa firoota Paalesxiiniif qabuufi.

title: US service member killed during detonation of Iranian drone in Iraq
english: A United States military service member died in northern Iraq while attempting to safely detonate an explosive device recovered from an Iranian drone. This tragic incident occurred just one day after another Iranian-linked attack in Jordan resulted in the deaths of two American soldiers. Military officials are currently managing the aftermath of these back-to-back security threats in the region.
amharic: በሰሜን ኢራቅ የወደቀ የኢራን ድሮን የያዘውን ፈንጂ ለማምከን ሲሞከር አንድ የአሜሪካ ወታደር ሕይወቱ አልፏል። ይህ አሳዛኝ ክስተት የተከሰተው በዮርዳኖስ በደረሰ ሌላ የኢራን ጥቃት ሁለት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ከተገደሉ ከአንድ ቀን በኋላ ነው። ወታደራዊ ባለስልጣናት በአካባቢው የተከሰቱትን ተከታታይ የጸጥታ ችግሮች እየመረመሩ ነው።
oromo: Iraaq kaabaatti waraanni Ameerikaa tokko xiyyaara malee to’annoo irra ture kan Iraaniin qophaa’e kan dhuka’uuf ture bakka hundeeffatuu erga yaalii booda du’eera. Rakkoon kun kan mudate guyyaa tokko dura Yordaanoos keessatti xiyyaara Iraaniin waraana Ameerikaa lama erga ajjeefamanii booda dha. Humni waraanaa Ameerikaa rakkoolee nageenyaa naannoo sanaa irratti qorannoo geggeessaa jiru.

title: Norway opens new memorial for victims of 2011 Breivik massacre
english: Norway has unveiled a new memorial in Oslo to honor the 77 victims of the 2011 terror attack carried out by Anders Breivik. The artwork, which features a bird native to Utoeya island, stands as a symbol of democratic resilience near the site of the original government building bombing. The ceremony was attended by survivors, grieving families, and government officials to commemorate those lost ahead of the tragedy's anniversary.
amharic: ኖርዌይ በ2011 በአንደርስ ብሬቪክ ለተፈጸመው አሰቃቂ የሽብር ጥቃት ሰለባ ለሆኑ 77 ሰዎች መታሰቢያ የሚሆን አዲስ ሐውልት በአስሎ ከተማ ከፍታለች። በኡቶያ ደሴት የሚገኝ ወፍ ምስልን የሚያሳየው ይህ የጥበብ ሥራ፣ ጥቃቱ በተፈጸመበት የመንግስት ሕንፃ አካባቢ ለዲሞክራሲያዊ ጥንካሬ እንደ ምልክት ሆኖ ይቆማል። የመታሰቢያው ሐውልት ምረቃ በሕይወት የተረፉትን፣ የሟቾች ቤተሰቦችን እና የመንግሥት ባለሥልጣናትን በማሰባሰብ የጥቃቱን ዓመታዊ በዓል በማሰብ ተካሂዷል።
oromo: Norweeyn namoota 77 bara 2011 haleellaa shororkeessummaa Anders Breiviktiin du’aniif yaadannoo haaraa magaalaa Oslo keessatti dhaabdeetti. Aartiiwwan kun, simbirroo ganda Utoeya keessatti argamtu kan agarsiisu yoo ta’u, iddoo haleellaa boombii sanaatti mallattoo jabaachuu demokraasii ta’ee dhaabbata. Sirna eebbaa kana irratti namoonni haleellaa sana irraa oolanii fi maatiin miidhamtootaa akkasumas aanga’oonni mootummaa argamuun yaadannoo kana kabajaniiru.

title: US bombs Iran for ninth consecutive night as Hormuz tensions escalate
english: For nine straight nights, the United States has conducted military strikes across various Iranian cities to weaken Iran's ability to threaten commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. This escalation follows the breakdown of a recent ceasefire and the death of another American soldier. In response, Iranian authorities report retaliatory missile attacks against US military assets, as tensions spread to neighboring countries in the region.
amharic: አሜሪካ በሆርሙዝ ስትሬት የንግድ መርከቦች ላይ የሚደርሰውን ጥቃት ለመከላከል በሚል፣ ለተከታታይ ዘጠኝ ቀናት በአይራን ከተሞች ላይ የአየር ድብደባ ፈጽማለች። ይህ ወታደራዊ እርምጃ የተወሰደው በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል የተደረገው የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት በመፍረሱ እና ተጨማሪ የአሜሪካ ወታደር በመገደሉ ምክንያት ነው። ኢራንም ለአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ መሠረቶች በሚሳኤል ጥቃት ምላሽ እየሰጠች ሲሆን፣ ውጥረቱ ወደ ጎረቤት ሀገራትም እየተዛመተ ይገኛል።
oromo: Amerikaa dirree galaana Hormuz keessatti dooniiwwan daldalaa irratti miidhaa gahu ittisuuf jechuun, guyyoota sagal walitti aansuun magaalaawwan Iraan irratti haleellaa qilleensa irraa raawwatteetti. Tarkaanfiin kun kan dhufe walii galteen dhaabbii waraanaa dhiyeenya biyyoota lamaan gidduutti godhame diigamuu fi waraanni Amerikaa kan biraan ajjeefamuu isaatiin walqabatee dha. Iraanis gama isheetiin buufataalee waraana Amerikaa irratti haleellaa misayiliin deebii kenniteetti; waraanni kunis gara biyyoota ollaa gahuun sodaachisaa jira.

title: Iran war live: US military carries out another wave of strikes on Iran
english: The United States military has launched a fresh series of airstrikes against Iranian targets for the ninth night in a row. These operations aim to weaken Iran's ability to interfere with commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. Additionally, a U.S. service member was killed in northern Iraq during an operation involving the disposal of debris from a downed Iranian drone.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል በኢራን ላይ ለተከታታይ ዘጠነኛው ምሽት የአየር ጥቃት መፈጸሙን አስታውቋል። እነዚህ ጥቃቶች ኢራን በሆርሙዝ ባህረ ሰላጤ ውስጥ የንግድ መርከቦችን እንዳትረብሽ አቅሟን ለመቀነስ ያለመ ነው። በሌላ በኩል በሰሜን ኢራቅ በተካሄደ የፈንጂ ማስወገድ ስራ ወቅት አንድ የአሜሪካ ወታደር ህይወቱ ማለፉ ተገልጿል።
oromo: Humnoonni waraana Ameerikaa halkanii saglaffaadhaaf walitti aansuun bakkeewwan Iran irratti haleellaa qilleensa irraa raawwataniiru. Haleellaan kun kan qajeele dandeetti Iran bakka bishaan hormuuzitti dooniiwwan daldalaa gufachiisuu itti qabdu laaffisuufi. Kana malees, kaaba Iraaq keessatti, xiyyaara malee to’annoo Iran jala turte irraa hafe balleessuuf yaali godhame irratti, waraanni Ameerikaa tokko du’eera.

title: US soldier killed in Iraq during ‘controlled detonation’ of Iranian drone
english: A United States soldier died in northern Iraq while attempting to safely destroy a downed Iranian drone. This incident marks the 17th American military fatality since the escalation of the conflict between the US and Iran earlier this year. Ongoing hostilities, including missile and drone exchanges, continue to destabilize the region and threaten global energy supplies.
amharic: በሰሜን ኢራቅ የተከሰከሰ የኢራን ድሮን በቁጥጥር ስር በዋለ ፍንዳታ ለማጥፋት በተሞከረበት ወቅት አንድ የአሜሪካ ወታደር ህይወቱ አልፏል። ይህ ክስተት በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል ግጭቱ ከተጀመረ ወዲህ 17ኛው የአሜሪካ ወታደር መሞቱን ያሳያል። ሁለቱ ሀገራት እያደረጉት ያለው ተከታታይ የሚሳኤል እና የድሮን ጥቃት በክልሉ ያለውን አለመረጋጋት የባሰ አባብሶታል፤ ይህም በአለም አቀፍ የኢነርጂ አቅርቦት ላይ ስጋት ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Loltuun Ameerikaa tokko kaaba Iraaq keessatti, xiyyaara nama hin feene kan Iraan kan bu’e fashalsuuf yommuu yaalame lubbuun isaa darbeera. Ajjeechaan kun waraana Ameerikaa fi Iraan gidduutti jalqabe irraa jalqabee waraana Ameerikaa 17ffaa ta’eera. Walitti bu’iinsi biyyoota lamaanii fi weerarri xiyyaaraa fi misaa’elaa itti fufe kun naannicha keessatti jeequmsa guddaa uumuun, dhiyeessii anniisaa addunyaa irratti soda guddaa uumeera.

title: US Vice President JD Vance and his wife announce birth of fourth child
english: US Vice President JD Vance and his wife, Usha, have welcomed their fourth child, a baby boy named Alec Neel Vance, born at a military hospital in Maryland. This event marks a historical milestone as it is the first time in over 150 years that a sitting vice president has had a child. The couple, who already have three older children, shared that both the mother and baby are healthy and doing well.
amharic: የአሜሪካው ምክትል ፕሬዝዳንት ጄዲ ቫንስ እና ባለቤታቸው ኡሻ አራተኛ ልጃቸውን አግኝተዋል። አሌክ ኒል ቫንስ የተባለው ወንድ ልጅ በሜሪላንድ በሚገኝ ወታደራዊ ሆስፒታል የተወለደ ሲሆን፣ ይህም ላለፉት 150 ዓመታት በስልጣን ላይ ባለ ምክትል ፕሬዝዳንት የተወለደ የመጀመሪያው ልጅ ሆኗል። ጥንዶቹ ቀደም ሲል ሶስት ልጆች ያሏቸው ሲሆን እናትየውም ሆነ ህጻኑ በጥሩ ጤንነት ላይ እንደሚገኙ ተገልጿል።
oromo: Itti aantuun pirezidaantii Ameerikaa JD Vance fi haati warraa isaanii Usha ilmoo isaanii arfaffaa, ilmoo dhiiraa Alec Neel Vance jedhamuun walitti dhufeera. Ilmoon kunis hospitaala waraanaa Maryland keessatti kan dhalate yoo ta'u, kunis waggaa 150 keessatti yeroo jalqabaaf itti aantuun pirezidaantii tokko ofii isaanii yeroo aangoo irra jiranitti ijoollee godhachuun isaa seenaa guddaa dha. Warri kun duruu ijoollee sadii kan qaban yoo ta'u, haati fi mucaanis fayyaa akka qaban ibsameera.

title: A bird’s-eye view as Donald Trump arrives for the World Cup final
english: President Donald Trump attended the 2026 FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina. He reached the New York New Jersey Stadium via the presidential helicopter, Marine One. Aerial footage of his arrival was shared online by his daughter, Ivanka Trump, shortly before the game started.
amharic: ፕሬዚዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ በስፔን እና በአርጀንቲና መካከል በተካሄደው የ2026 የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ጨዋታ ላይ ተገኝተዋል። ወደ ኒውዮርክ ኒው ጀርሲ ስታዲየም የተጓዙት በማሪን ዋን ፕሬዚዳንታዊ ሄሊኮፕተር ነው። የሄሊኮፕተሩን መምጣት የሚያሳይ ምስል ሴት ልጃቸው ኢቫንካ ትራምፕ ጨዋታው ከመጀመሩ ጥቂት ቀደም ብሎ በማህበራዊ ሚዲያ አጋርታለች።
oromo: Pireezidaanti Donaald Tiraamp tapha xumuraa Waancaa Addunyaa bara 2026 kan Ispeen fi Arjantiinaa gidduutti gaggeeffame irratti argamaniiru. gara buufata istaadiyoomii Niiw Yoorki fi Niiw Jeersii kan dhaqan xiyyaara hayikopitara mootummaa Maariin Waaniin ture. Viidiyoon daawwii isaanii kunis intala isaanii Iivaankaa Tiraampin taphichi osoo hin jalqabin dura miidiyaa hawaasaarratti gadhiifameera.

title: IRGC says Iran targeted two oil tankers in Hormuz Strait
english: The Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps recently obstructed two oil tankers attempting to navigate the Strait of Hormuz. Iranian officials claimed the vessels were acting under American pressure and labeled the U.S. presence in the region as illegal. They further warned that maritime traffic in the area will remain insecure as long as the United States continues its influence in the region.
amharic: የኢራን እስላማዊ አብዮታዊ ዘበኞች ሰራዊት በሆርሙዝ ባህረ ሰላጤ ውስጥ ያልፉ የነበሩ ሁለት የነዳጅ መርከቦችን ማገዱን አስታውቋል። ኢራን መርከቦቹ በአሜሪካ ግፊት እየተንቀሳቀሱ እንደሆነ በመግለጽ የአሜሪካን ወታደራዊ መገኘት በክልሉ ተቀባይነት እንደሌለው ተችታለች። አሜሪካ በክልሉ ጣልቃ መግባቷን እስካላቆመች ድረስ አካባቢው ለንግድ መርከቦች አስተማማኝ እንደማይሆንም አስጠንቅቀዋል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyyaa Iran (IRGC) dooniiwwan boba'aa lama kan dhangala'aa boba'aa fe'atanii Hormuz keessa darba turan daangeessuufi qabachuu isaa beeksiseera. Mootummaan Iran tarkaanfichi kan fudhatame dooniiwwan kun dhiibbaa Ameerikaa jala waan jiraniif akka ta'e ibse. Ameerikaan naannichatti gidduu seenuu ishii yoo itti fufte, karaa bishaanii kun dooniiwwan daldalaaf tasgabbii kan hin qabne ta'uu isaa akeekkachiiseera.

title: Trump says US hitting Iran 'very hard' to honour soldiers killed
english: President Donald Trump announced that the U.S. conducted forceful military strikes against Iran to pay tribute to three American soldiers who were recently killed. He emphasized that these service members died while working to prevent Iran from acquiring nuclear weapons. The President expressed deep sorrow regarding the loss of these soldiers during his briefing to the press.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ በቅርቡ ለተገደሉ ሶስት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ክብር ሲባል በኢራን ላይ ጠንካራ ወታደራዊ እርምጃ መወሰዱን አስታውቀዋል። ወታደሮቹ ህይወታቸውን ያጡት ኢራን የኒውክሌር ጦር መሳሪያ እንዳታገኝ ለመከላከል በሚደረገው ጥረት ውስጥ እንደሆነ ገልጸዋል። ፕሬዝዳንቱ ስለ ወታደሮቹ መሞት የተሰማቸውን ጥልቅ ሀዘን ለጋዜጠኞች ተናግረዋል።
oromo: Pireezidaant Donald Traamp waraana Ameerikaa sadan dhiheenya kana ajjeefamaniif kabaja kennuuf jecha, Yunaayitid Isteets tarkaanfii cimaa waraanaa Iraan irratti fudhachuu ishee ibsan. Waraanonni kun kan du'an Iraan meeshaa niwuukilaraa akka hin arganne ittisuuf osoo qabsaa'anii akka ta'e dubbataniiru. Pireezidaantichi waa'ee wareegama waraana kanaa ilaalchisee gadda guddaa itti dhaga'ame ibsaniiru.

title: Iran launches new attacks on 'enemy targets', as ongoing blasts heard south of the country
english: Explosions have been reported across several southern Iranian regions, including Bushehr and Hormozgan. Simultaneously, state media confirmed that the country has launched fresh missile strikes from Lorestan against unidentified targets. These events mark a significant escalation in regional military activity.
amharic: በኢራን ደቡባዊ ክፍሎች እንደ ቡሼህር እና ሆርሞዝጋን ባሉ አካባቢዎች ተከታታይ ፍንዳታዎች እየተሰሙ መሆኑ ተዘግቧል። በተመሳሳይ መልኩ፣ የሀገሪቱ የመንግስት ሚዲያ ኢራን ከሎሬስታን ግዛት ወደ ተለያዩ የጠላት ኢላማዎች አዲስ የሚሳኤል ጥቃት መክፈቷን አረጋግጧል። ይህ ክስተት በክልሉ ያለውን ወታደራዊ እንቅስቃሴ በእጅጉ ያባባሰው ይመስላል።
oromo: Naannoolee kibba Iraan kanneen akka Bushehr fi Hormozgan keessatti dhukaatin gurguddaan dhaga'amaa jiraachuu gabaasameera. Yeroo wal fakkaatuun, miidiyaan mootummaa Iraan biyyattiin Loresataan irraa gara kaayyoo diinaa jedhamanitti miisaayila haaraa gadi lakkisuu ishee mirkaneesseera. Gochi kun naannichatti sochiin waraanaa daran akka jabaate agarsiisa.

title: Vessel ablaze off the coast of Oman's Kumzar, UKMTO says
english: A ship has caught fire near Kumzar, Oman, according to a report from the United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations. Authorities are currently investigating the incident to determine the cause of the blaze. Nearby vessels have been warned to exercise caution while traveling through the area.
amharic: የዩናይትድ ኪንግደም የባህር ንግድ ኦፕሬሽንስ እንደገለጸው በኦማን ኩምዛር አቅራቢያ አንዲት መርከብ በእሳት ተቃጥላለች። የባህር ኃይል ባለስልጣናት የእሳቱን መንስኤ ለማወቅ ምርመራ እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ። በአካባቢው የሚያልፉ ሌሎች መርከቦች ጥንቃቄ እንዲያደርጉ እና አጠራጣሪ እንቅስቃሴዎችን እንዲያሳውቁ ተመክሯል።
oromo: Akka gabaasaa hojii daldala galaana UKMTO tti, markabni tokko qarqara galaana Omaan kan taate Kumzaaritti ibiddaan gubachaa jira. Qaamoleen nageenyaa sababa ibidda kanaa qorachaa jiru. Markaboonni naannichaan darban akka of eeggannoo gootan fi wanta shakkisiisaa ta'e yoo argan akka gabaasan hubachiiseera.

title: Iran could 'target unspecified locations' in central Manama, US embassy in Bahrain warns
english: The United States Embassy in Bahrain has issued a security alert warning that Iranian forces might be planning attacks on unknown sites within the center of Manama. American citizens in the area are being advised to stay alert and pay close attention to official safety instructions. The embassy also recommends that residents regularly check their updates for further security guidance.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ኤምባሲ በባህሬን ዋና ከተማ ማናማ ማዕከላዊ አካባቢዎች ኢራን ጥቃት ልትሰነዝር እንደምትችል አስጠንቅቋል። በዚህም ምክንያት በአካባቢው የሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ዜጎች ከፍተኛ ጥንቃቄ እንዲያደርጉ እና የአካባቢውን ባለስልጣናት መመሪያ እንዲከተሉ ተመክሯል። ኤምባሲው ዜጎች ወቅታዊ መረጃዎችን በየጊዜው እንዲከታተሉ አሳስቧል።
oromo: Embaasiin Ameerikaa Baahireyn keessatti argamu, humnoonni Iraan magaala Manamaa giddu galeessaatti iddoowwan hin ibsamin irratti miidhaa geessisuu akka danda'an akeekkachiiseera. Lammiileen Ameerikaa naannichatti argaman of eeggannoo cimaa akka taasisan fi qajeelfamoota aangoolee naannoo hordofuuf gorfamaniiru. Kana malees, embaasiin kun lammiileen odeeffannoowwan dhihoo ta'an hordofuu akka qaban yaadachiiseera.

title: When is the next FIFA World Cup? 2030 hosts, dates and format
english: The 2030 FIFA World Cup will be a historic event spanning three continents and six nations to mark the tournament's 100th anniversary. Uruguay, Argentina, and Paraguay will host special opening matches in June 2030 to celebrate the centenary, while Morocco, Portugal, and Spain will serve as the primary host countries for the rest of the competition. This unique format ensures that all six host nations qualify automatically, with the final match currently scheduled for July 21, 2030.
amharic: የ2030 የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ የውድድሩን 100ኛ ዓመት ለማክበር በሶስት አህጉራት እና በስድስት ሀገራት የሚካሄድ ታሪካዊ ክስተት ይሆናል። ኡራጓይ፣ አርጀንቲና እና ፓራጓይ በሰኔ 2030 ልዩ የመክፈቻ ጨዋታዎችን የሚያስተናግዱ ሲሆን፣ ዋናዎቹ የውድድር ጨዋታዎች በሞሮኮ፣ በፖርቹጋል እና በስፔን ይከናወናሉ። ይህ አዲስ አሰራር ስድስቱም አስተናጋጅ ሀገራት በራስ-ሰር እንዲያልፉ የሚያደርግ ሲሆን፣ የፍጻሜ ጨዋታውም በጁላይ 21 ቀን 2030 እንዲደረግ ታቅዷል።
oromo: Wancaa Addunyaa FIFA bara 2030 kan kabajamuuf, seenaa waggaa 100ffaa isaatiif jecha biyyoota jahaa fi kutaalee addunyaa sadii irratti kan geggeeffamu ta'a. Uruuguwaay, Arjantiinaa fi Paraaguwaay baatii Waxabajjii 2030 keessa taphoota jalqabaa addaa kan qopheessan yoo ta'u, taphoonni gurguddoon biyyoota Mooroookkoo, Poorchugaal fi Ispeen keessatti kan gaggeeffaman ta'a. Haala kanaan biyyoonni jahaan kun mirga hirmaannaa kan argatan yoo ta'u, taphi xumuraa akka lakkoofsa Awurooppaatti guyyaa 21 Waxabajjii 2030 akka geggeeffamu karoorfamee jira.

title: Spain battle past 10-man Argentina 1-0 in extra-time to win 2026 World Cup
english: Spain secured their second World Cup title by defeating Argentina 1-0 in extra time. Ferran Torres scored the decisive goal shortly after Argentina was reduced to ten players due to a red card for Enzo Fernandez. This victory marks a historic achievement for Spain, as they maintained a dominant defensive performance throughout the entire tournament.
amharic: ስፔን አርጀንቲናን በጭማሪ ደቂቃ 1 ለ 0 በማሸነፍ ለሁለተኛ ጊዜ የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸናፊ ሆናለች። በኤንዞ ፈርናንዴዝ የቀይ ካርድ ምክንያት አርጀንቲና በ10 ተጫዋች ብቻ መጫወቷ ለስፔን ድል መንገድ ከፍቷል፤ ፌራን ቶሬስም የጨዋታውን ብቸኛ ግብ አስቆጥሯል። ስፔን በውድድሩ በሙሉ አንድ ግብ ብቻ በማስተናገድ አስደናቂ የተከላካይ ብቃት በማሳየት ታሪካዊ ድል ተቀዳጅታለች።
oromo: Ispaan Arjentiinaa daqiiqaa dabalataa keessatti 1-0 mo'achuun waancaa addunyaa isa lammaffaa fudhatteetti. Arjentiinaan taphataa Enzo Fernandez kaardii diimaan ergamee booda namoota 10n taphachuun ishee Ispaaniif carraa uumeera, akkasumas Ferran Torres goolii tokkittii galcheera. Ispaanin tapha guutuu keessatti goolii tokko qofa keessummeessuun, dandeettii ittisaa ajaa'ibaa agarsiisuun injifannoo seena qabeessa galmeessiteetti.

title: When, where, and how Spain won the World Cup final against Argentina
english: Spain secured their second World Cup title by defeating Argentina 1-0 in a hard-fought final at the New York New Jersey Stadium. Ferran Torres scored the decisive goal during extra time after a well-executed header from Nico Williams. Argentina struggled late in the match after playing with only ten men following a red card given to Enzo Fernandez.
amharic: ስፔን በአርጀንቲና ላይ 1 ለ 0 በማሸነፍ ለሁለተኛ ጊዜ የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸናፊ ሆናለች። የድሉን ግብ በጭማሪ ሰዓት ላይ ያስቆጠረው ፈራን ቶሬስ ሲሆን፣ ጎሉም የተገኘው ከኒኮ ዊሊያምስ በተሻገረለት ኳስ ነው። አርጀንቲና በኤንዞ ፈርናንዴዝ ላይ በደረሰው ቀይ ካርድ ምክንያት በአስር ተጫዋቾች ብቻ በመጫወቷ ለሽንፈት ተዳርጋለች።
oromo: Ispayin arjantiinaa 1-0 injifachuun marsaa lammaffaaf mo'ataa waancaa addunyaa taateerti. Galchi injifannoo kun yeroo dabalataa irratti kan lakkaa'ame yoo ta'u, kanneen galchu kana hordofsiisan ammoo qophii Niikoo Wiiliyaamsiiti. Arjantiinaan taphataa ishee Enzoo Fernaandez kaardii diimaan ergameen booda namoota kudhaniin taphachuu waan dirqamteef, injifannoo kana galagallachuu hin dandeenye.

title: Israeli forces, settlers kill two in Ramallah
english: Two Palestinians were fatally shot by Israeli military forces and settlers in the West Bank town of Deir Jarir. The Palestinian health ministry confirmed the deaths occurred during an incursion into the area near Ramallah. Local reports identified one of the victims as Ahmed Adel Rashid Abu Makho.
amharic: በዌስት ባንክ በዴየር ጃሪር ከተማ በእስራኤል ወታደሮች እና ሰፋሪዎች በተከፈተ ተኩስ ሁለት ፍልስጤማውያን ተገድለዋል። የፍልስጤም የጤና ሚኒስቴር እንደገለጸው ግድያው የተፈጸመው በራማላህ አቅራቢያ ባለው አካባቢ በተደረገ ወረራ ወቅት ነው። ከአካባቢው የተገኙ መረጃዎችም ከሟቾቹ መካከል አንዱ አህመድ አዴል ራሺድ አቡ ማክሆ መሆኑን አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Magala Deeyir Jaariir kan naannoo West Bank keessatti, waraanni Israa'el fi qonnaan bultoonni isaanitti dhukaasuu isaaniitiin namoonni Falasxiin lama ajjeefamaniiru. Ministeerri fayyaa Falasxiin akka mirkaneessetti, ajjeechaan kun kan raawwatame yeroo humnoonni kun magaalaa Raamallah biratti argamtu tokko cabsanii seenanitti. Gabaasni naannichaa akka agarsiisutti, namoota ajjeefaman keessaa tokko Ahimad Aadel Raashid Abuu Maakhoo jedhama.

title: World Cup 2026: What are the extra time and penalty shootout rules?
english: In the 2026 World Cup knockout rounds, if a game ends in a draw, teams play an additional 30 minutes of extra time divided into two halves. If the score remains tied after this period, the winner is decided by a penalty shootout where each team initially takes five shots. If they are still even, the contest enters sudden death, where the teams take turns until one side fails to score while the other succeeds.
amharic: የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ የማንኳኳት ውድድሮች አቻ ሲሆኑ፣ አሸናፊውን ለመለየት የ30 ደቂቃ ተጨማሪ የጨዋታ ጊዜ ይጨመራል። በዚህ ጊዜ ውስጥ አሸናፊ ካልተገኘ፣ እያንዳንዱ ቡድን አምስት የፍጹም ቅጣት ምቶችን በመምታት አሸናፊውን ለመለየት ይሞክራል። አሁንም አቻ ከሆነ፣ አንደኛው ቡድን እስኪሸነፍ ድረስ በተራ በተራ የሚመታበት ድንገተኛ የጥሎ ማለፍ ስርዓት ይከተላል።
oromo: Qophiin Waancaa Addunyaa 2026 yoo taphni taphataan walqixa ta'e, injifannoo argachuuf daqiiqaa 30 dabalataa taphatama. Yeroo kana boodas yoo walqixa ta'e, gareen hundi dha'icha adabbii (penalty) shan shan akka tuman godhama. Yoo ammas walqixa ta'e, hanga gareen tokko injifannoo argatuutti gareewwan wal jijjiiranii tumuun injifannoon murtaa'a.

title: US Centcom says seven commercial vessels stopped under Iran naval blockade
english: The United States Central Command reported that its military forces intervened to assist seven commercial ships during an Iranian naval blockade. Six of these vessels were successfully redirected, while one ship was disabled. This operation highlights the ongoing maritime tensions in the region.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ሴንትኮም በኢራን የባህር ኃይል ታግደው የነበሩ ሰባት የንግድ መርከቦችን መርዳቱን አስታውቋል። አሜሪካ ስድስቱን መርከቦች ወደ ሌላ አቅጣጫ እንዲሄዱ በማድረግ ያዳነች ሲሆን አንዱን መርከብ ግን ማሰናከል ችላለች። ይህ ክስተት በክልሉ ያለውን የባህር ላይ ውጥረት አመላካች ነው።
oromo: Ajajni Giddu-galeessa Ameerikaa (US Centcom) humnoonni isaa markaboota daldalaa torba gama galaanaatiin Iranin ugguraman irratti gidduu seenuu beeksise. Ameerikaan markaboota jahan gara biraatti akka deeman gochuun kan oolchite yoo ta'u, markaba tokko ammoo hojii ala gooteetti. Gochi kun walitti bu'iinsa bishaan irraa naannichatti mul'achaa jiru kan ibsuudha.

title: Sirens sounded in Bahrain, interior ministry says
english: The Bahraini Interior Ministry has activated emergency warning sirens across the country. Officials have officially requested that all citizens and residents stay composed during this period. Everyone is advised to proceed immediately to the closest available shelter for their safety.
amharic: የባህሬን የሀገር ውስጥ ጉዳይ ሚኒስቴር በአገሪቱ ውስጥ የአደጋ ማስጠንቀቂያ ደወሎችን አሰምቷል። ባለስልጣናት ሁሉም ዜጎችና ነዋሪዎች በዚህ ወቅት መረጋጋትን እንዲጠብቁ አሳስበዋል። ለደህንነታቸው ሲባል ሁሉም ሰው በአቅራቢያው ወደሚገኝ መጠለያ እንዲሄዱ ምክር ተሰጥቷል።
oromo: Ministeerri Dhimma Keessa biyya Baahireen biyyattii keessatti sirna akeekkachiisa yeroo muddamaa hojii irra oolcheera. Aangeyyoonni lammiileen fi jiraattonni yeroo kanatti tasgabbii akka qabaatan gaafataniiru. Namni hundi nageenya isaaniif jecha bakka jiranitti gara iddoo qubannaa ykn dawoo dhihoo jiruutti akka deeman gorfamaniiru.

title: Israeli ministers join march to Gaza to demand return of settlements
english: Several high-ranking Israeli ministers and lawmakers participated in a protest near the Gaza border to advocate for the re-establishment of Jewish settlements that were removed in 2005. Despite military restrictions aimed at keeping the crowd away from the border fence, some participants bypassed security to demonstrate their demand for resettlement. This event highlights how calls for occupying Gaza have gained significant traction within Israel's current political leadership.
amharic: የእስራኤል ካቢኔ አባላት እና የፓርላማ ተወካዮች እ.ኤ.አ በ2005 የተነሱትን የአይሁድ ሰፈራዎች በጋዛ ዳግም ለመገንባት በሚጠይቅ ሰልፍ ላይ ተሳትፈዋል። ሰልፈኞቹ ወታደራዊ እገዳዎችን በመጣስ ወደ ጋዛ ድንበር በመቅረብ የሰፈራ ስራው እንዲጀመር ግፊት አድርገዋል። ይህ ክስተት በጋዛ ሰፈራዎችን የመመስረት ጥያቄ በአሁኑ የእስራኤል መንግስት ውስጥ ከፍተኛ ተቀባይነት እያገኘ መምጣቱን ያሳያል።
oromo: Hoggantoonni mootummaa fi miseensonni paarlamaa Israa'el, magaala Gaza keessatti buufataalee bara 2005 irraa kaafaman deebi'anii ijaaruuf hiriira bahaniiru. Hiriirtotni kunneen akeekkachiisa waraanaa darbanii daangaa Gaza bira gahuun, lafa sana deebi'anii qabachuu akka barbaadan ibsaniiru. Gochi kun yaanni Gaza keessatti qubachuu jedhu guddina fi hirmaannaa siyaasaa Israa'el keessatti iddoo bal'aa argachaa dhufuu isaa kan agarsiisuudha.

title: What happened in the first half of the Spain vs Argentina World Cup final?
english: The World Cup final between Spain and Argentina remained scoreless after a cautious first half in New Jersey. Spain dominated ball possession and created a few scoring chances, while Argentina focused on a physical defensive strategy. The match faced a slight delay due to pre-game ceremonies and remains tightly contested as both teams struggle to break the deadlock.
amharic: በኒው ጀርሲ በተካሄደው የስፔን እና የአርጀንቲና የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ የመጀመሪያ አጋማሽ ያለ ግብ ተጠናቋል። ስፔን በኳስ ቁጥጥር ብልጫ ወስዳ ጥቂት የግብ ሙከራዎችን ብታደርግም፣ አርጀንቲና ግን ጠንካራ እና አቅጣጫውን የጠበቀ የመከላከል ጨዋታን መርጣለች። የቅድመ ጨዋታ ስነ-ስርዓቶች በጨዋታው መጀመር ላይ መዘግየትን የፈጠሩ ሲሆን፣ ሁለቱም ቡድኖች በሁለተኛው አጋማሽ ግብ ለማስቆጠር ብርቱ ትንቅንቅ ውስጥ ገብተዋል።
oromo: Fiinalii waancaa addunyaa kan Ispeenii fi Arjentiinaa gidduutti godhame walakkaa isa duraa goolii malee xumurameera. Ispeen qabiyyee kubbaa irratti caaltee carraa golaa uumuuf yaaltus, Arjentiinaan garuu qophii ittisaa cimaa irratti xiyyeeffattee taphatteetti. Sirni eebbaa taphicha dura ture turti muraasa erga uumee booda, gareen lamaanuu walakkaa lammaffaa irratti goolii galchuuf wal-dorgomaa jiru.

title: Andy Burnham’s in-tray: The challenges facing the new UK PM
english: Andy Burnham is set to become the United Kingdom's new prime minister on Monday after being chosen to lead the Labour Party following Keir Starmer's resignation. He inherits a difficult situation characterized by long-term economic stagnation, high national debt, and declining public support for his party. Experts suggest he will face significant fiscal constraints, requiring him to focus on creative, cost-effective reforms to address the country's pressing challenges.
amharic: አንዲ በረንሃም የኬይር ስታርመርን መልቀቅ ተከትሎ የሌበር ፓርቲ መሪ በመሆን ሰኞ ዕለት የዩናይትድ ኪንግደም ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሆነው ይሾማሉ። አዲሱ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ለረጅም ጊዜ የዘለቀ የኢኮኖሚ መቀዛቀዝ፣ ከፍተኛ የብድር ጫና እና በፓርቲያቸው ላይ ያለው የሕዝብ ድጋፍ መቀነስ የመሰሉ ከባድ ፈተናዎች ይጠብቋቸዋል። ባለሙያዎች እንደሚናገሩት፣ በረንሃም ውስን በሆነ የኢኮኖሚ አቅም ውስጥ ውጤታማ ለውጦችን ለማምጣት አዳዲስ እና አነስተኛ ወጪ የሚጠይቁ መፍትሄዎችን መተግበር ይኖርባቸዋል።
oromo: Andy Burnham jijjiirama Keir Starmer booda guddina paartii Labour hogganuudhaan Wixata dhufu biyya UK itti gaafatamtootaa ta'uuf qophiirra jiru. Ministirri kun rakkoo diinagdee waggoota hedduuf turerra, liqii biyyaalessaa olka'aa fi deggera ummataa paartii isaanii irratti hir'atee jiru dhaalu. Ogeeyyonni akka jedhanitti, Burnham rakkoolee kana hiikuuf gargaarsa baajataa murtaa'aa ta'e keessatti tarkaanfii bu'a-qabeessa ta'e fudhachuuf mala haaraa fi gatii gadi aanaa qabu fayyadamuu qabu.

title: Twin earthquakes strike Peru killing at least five
english: Two earthquakes hit the mountainous Junin region of Peru, causing the deaths of at least five people and injuring over 20 others. Many homes, often built from fragile adobe bricks, collapsed during the tremors, leaving hundreds of residents displaced. Rescue teams are currently working to clear debris and search for any survivors who might still be trapped.
amharic: በፔሩ የጁኒን ተራራማ አካባቢ በተከሰቱ ሁለት ተከታታይ የመሬት መንቀጥቀጦች ቢያንስ አምስት ሰዎች ሲሞቱ ከ20 በላይ የሚሆኑት ደግሞ ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። በድንጋይ እና በጭቃ የተገነቡ በርካታ መኖሪያ ቤቶች በመፍረሳቸው በመቶዎች የሚቆጠሩ ነዋሪዎች ቤት አልባ ሆነዋል። የአደጋ ጊዜ ሰራተኞች በፍርስራሽ ውስጥ ተይዘው ሊገኙ የሚችሉ ሰዎችን ፍለጋ እያካሄዱ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Piroo keessatti dachii raafamuun mudate lamaan naannoo gaarreen Juuniinitti lubbuu namoota shan galaafatee, namoota 20 ol ta'an irratti immoo miidhaa geessiseera. Manneen biyyee fi dhagaadhaan ijaaramanii turan hedduun isaanii waan diigamaniif, jiraattonni dhibbaan lakkaa'aman qe'ee isaanii irraa buqqa'aniiru. Gareen gargaarsa namootaa immoo, namoonni diigama keessatti hafan yoo jiraatan barbaaduu fi qulqulleessuu itti fufaniiru.

title: The UK gets its seventh prime minister in 10 years
english: The United Kingdom has appointed Andy Burnham as its new Prime Minister, making him the seventh person to hold the office in a decade. He takes over during a period of significant economic struggle, including high living costs and ongoing immigration concerns. Burnham intends to change the country's governance style while also managing difficult international issues involving Iran and Ukraine.
amharic: የእንግሊዝ አዲስ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሆነው የተመረጡት አንዲ በርንሃም፣ በ10 ዓመታት ውስጥ ሰባተኛው የሀገሪቱ መሪ ሆነዋል። አዲሱ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ወደ ስልጣን የመጡት የኑሮ ውድነት እና የኢኮኖሚ መቀዛቀዝ በስፋት በተንሰራፋበት ወቅት ነው። በርንሃም የሀገሪቱን የአስተዳደር ስርዓት ለመቀየር እና በዩክሬን እና ኢራን ቀውሶች ላይ ትኩረት ለማድረግ አቅደዋል።
oromo: Andy Burnham muummichi ministeeraa haaraa biyyattii ta'uun, waggaa kudhan keessatti nama torbaffaa ta'anii filatamaniiru. Isaanis kan gara aangootti dhufan yeroo biyyattiin rakkoo dinagdee fi baasii jireenyaa olka'aa keessa jirtuudha. Burnham adeemsa bulchiinsa biyyattii fooyyessuu fi dhimmoota idil-addunyaa kanneen akka waraana Yukreen fi Iran irratti xiyyeeffachuuf karoorfataniiru.

title: Israel committed 3,795 ceasefire violations in Gaza: Report
english: A report from the Gaza government media office alleges that Israel has breached the October ceasefire agreement nearly 3,800 times. These actions have reportedly resulted in over 1,100 deaths, thousands of injuries, and numerous arrests. Furthermore, officials claim that humanitarian aid delivery remains severely hindered, with only about 35 percent of the agreed-upon supply trucks reaching the region.
amharic: የጋዛ የመንግስት ሚዲያ ቢሮ ባወጣው ሪፖርት እስራኤል በጥቅምት ወር የተፈረመውን የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት ወደ 3,800 ጊዜ ያህል እንደጣሰች አስታውቋል። በእነዚህ ጥሰቶች ከ1,100 በላይ ሰዎች ሲገደሉ፣ በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ጉዳት እንደደረሰባቸውና በርካታ ሰዎችም መታሰራቸው ተገልጿል። በተጨማሪም፣ እስራኤል የሰብአዊ እርዳታ አቅርቦትን በመገደቧ ከተስማሙት የጭነት መኪናዎች ውስጥ ወደ ጋዛ የገቡት 35 በመቶው ብቻ መሆናቸው ተጠቅሷል።
oromo: Waajjirri miidiyaa mootummaa Gaaza akka gabaasetti, Israa’el walii galtee ce’umsa waraanaa Sadaasa keessa godhame si’a 3,800 ol cabsiteetti. Gocha kanaan namoonni 1,100 ol ajjeefamanii, kumaatamaan kan lakkaa’aman miidhamuufi hedduun immoo qabamaniiru. Kana malees, Israa’el gargaarsa namoomaa daangessuun ishee, konkolaattoota gargaarsa 35% qofa ta’an gara Gaaza akka seenan taasiseera.

title: Qatar condemns Iranian attacks
english: Qatar's Foreign Minister recently spoke with officials from Saudi Arabia, Jordan, and Oman to discuss the ongoing regional tensions. He officially denounced the recent military strikes carried out by Iran. Furthermore, he emphasized the urgent need for all involved nations to resolve their disagreements through peaceful negotiation and diplomacy.
amharic: የኳታር የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስተር ከሳውዲ አረቢያ፣ ከዮርዳኖስ እና ከኦማን አቻዎቻቸው ጋር በስልክ ተወያይተዋል። ሚኒስትሩ በኢራን የተፈጸሙትን ጥቃቶች በይፋ አውግዘዋል። በተጨማሪም ሁሉም ወገኖች ችግሮችን በንግግር እና በዲፕሎማሲያዊ መንገድ እንዲፈቱ ጥሪ አቅርበዋል።
oromo: Ministirri dhimma alaa Qatar biyyoota akka Saudi Arabia, Jordan fi Oman waliin bilbilan mari’ataniiru. Ministirichi weerara Iran raawwatte kana balaaleffataniiru. Akkasumas, gama hundaa rakkoolee isaanii marii fi karaa nagaa ta’een akka hiikatan dhaamaniiru.

title: Fans light up NYC’s Little Argentina ahead of Spain World Cup final clash
english: Hundreds of Argentinian supporters gathered at a popular steakhouse in New York City's 'Little Argentina' district to watch the World Cup final against Spain. This venue, located in Queens, has served as a central hub for the community throughout the tournament. Fans filled the area with excitement and celebration in anticipation of the championship match.
amharic: የአርጀንቲና ደጋፊዎች በኒውዮርክ በሚገኘው 'ትንሿ አርጀንቲና' ሰፈር ውስጥ በሚገኝ አንድ ምግብ ቤት ውስጥ ተሰብስበው ስፔንን የሚገጥሙበትን የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍፃሜ ጨዋታ በጉጉት እየተጠባበቁ ነው። ይህ በኩዊንስ የሚገኝ ስፍራ በመላው የውድድር ጊዜ ለአርጀንቲናውያን ማህበረሰብ ዋና መገናኛ ሆኖ ቆይቷል። ደጋፊዎቹ ለጨዋታው ያላቸውን ድጋፍ ለመግለጽ በአካባቢው በከፍተኛ ደስታ ተሰባስበዋል።
oromo: Garee deggertoota Arjantiina hedduu ta'an kanneen Niyuu Yoorki keessatti argamu 'Arjantiina Xiqqoo' jedhamu keessatti walitti qabaman, tapha xumuraa waancaa addunyaa Ispeen waliin taasisan eeggachaa jiru. Bakki kun kan argamu Queens keessa yoo ta'u, yeroo tapha kanaa guutuu deggertootaaf iddoo walitti qeechaa guddaa ture. Deggertoonni kun tapha kanaaf gammachuu guddaadhaan qophaa'aa jiru.

title: Trump visit causes logistical delays at World Cup final
english: The World Cup final between Spain and Argentina faced significant logistical challenges due to President Donald Trump's attendance. Enhanced security measures, including Secret Service inspections and road closures, caused massive queues for fans and media, with many waiting for hours to enter. Technical issues with ticket scanners further complicated the situation, leading to frustration and the denial of entry for several accredited individuals.
amharic: የስፔን እና የአርጀንቲና የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ጨዋታ በፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ መገኘት ምክንያት ከፍተኛ የሎጂስቲክስ ችግሮች ገጥመውታል። በጥበቃ ስራው ምክንያት የተደረጉ የደህንነት ፍተሻዎች እና የመንገድ መዘጋቶች ለደጋፊዎች እና ለጋዜጠኞች ረጅም ሰልፍ እንዲፈጠር አድርጓል፤ ብዙዎችም ወደ ስታዲየም ለመግባት ለሰዓታት መጠበቅ ግድ ብሏቸዋል። የቲኬት መቃኛ መሳሪያዎች ላይ በተፈጠረ ችግር እና በተጠናከረ የደህንነት ጥበቃ ምክንያት ብዙ ሰዎች ከፍተኛ እንግልት የገጠማቸው ሲሆን፣ አንዳንድ እውቅና ያላቸው ግለሰቦችም ወደ ስፍራው እንዳይገቡ ተከልክለዋል።
oromo: Goolii xumuraa waancaa addunyaa kan Ispeen fi Arjantiinaa gidduutti ta’e irratti, argamuu pirezidaant Doonaald Tiraamp hordofee rakkooleen logistikii mudataniiru. Eegumsi nageenyaa cimaan taasifamee fi cufamuun daandiiwwanii, namoota taphicha hordofanii fi gabaastotaaf hiriira dheeraa kan uume yoo ta’u, hedduun isaanii gara giddugaleessa taphichaa seenuuf sa’aatiiwwan dheeraaf eeguu dirqamaniiru. Meeshaaleen tikitii sakatta’an rakkoo keessa galuu fi nageenyi cimaan akka laayyootti hin ilaalamne gufuu waan ta’eef, namoonni baay’een aaruu fi gariin isaanii iyyuu mirga seensa taphichaa qabaachaa utuu jiranii akka hin seenne dhorkamaniiru.

title: Kuwait says Iranian attacks damaged vital facilities
english: Kuwait's defense officials have reported that Iranian strikes have caused significant destruction and fires at key infrastructure sites. These attacks specifically targeted facilities linked to the nation's electricity and water sectors. The government has condemned these actions as an act of aggression against civilian installations.
amharic: የኩዌት መከላከያ ሚኒስቴር ኢራን በሀገሪቱ በሚገኙ ወሳኝ የሆኑ የመሰረተ ልማት ተቋማት ላይ ጥቃት በመሰንዘር ከፍተኛ ጉዳት ማድረሷን ገልጿል። ጥቃቱ የኤሌክትሪክ እና የውሃ አቅርቦት አገልግሎት የሚሰጡ ተቋማትን ያነጣጠረ ሲሆን፣ በቦታዎቹ ላይ የእሳት አደጋ እና የከፋ ውድመት አስከትሏል። ኩዌት ይህን ድርጊት የሲቪል ተቋማት ላይ የተፈጸመ ጥቃት በማለት አውግዛለች።
oromo: Mootummaan Kuweyt akka ibsetti, weerarri Iran bu'uuraalee misoomaa biyyattii irratti miidhaa guddaa geessiseera. Hojiin badii kun tajaajila elektirikii fi bishaanii kennan irratti xiyyeeffachuun ibiddaa fi miidhaa cimaa geessiseera. Kuweyt gochi kun dhaabbilee siviilii irratti kan raawwatame fi kan balaaleffatamu ta'uu ibsiteetti.

title: US service member killed in northern Iraq, US Central Command says
english: A U.S. service member tragically died in northern Iraq this past Saturday while working to safely destroy remnants of an Iranian drone. The incident occurred during a controlled operation to dispose of unexploded weaponry left behind by the downed aircraft. U.S. Central Command confirmed the loss as the soldier was performing these hazardous military duties.
amharic: ባለፈው ቅዳሜ በሰሜን ኢራቅ አንድ የአሜሪካ ወታደር በኢራን የተተኮሰ ድሮን ፍርስራሽ ለማጥፋት በተደረገ ጥረት ላይ እያለ ህይወቱ አልፏል። ወታደሩ የጠላት ድሮን ቀሪ ቁሶችን ደህንነቱ በተጠበቀ ሁኔታ ለማስወገድ በሙከራ ላይ እያለ ባጋጠመው አደጋ ነው የተገደለው። የአሜሪካ ማዕከላዊ ዕዝ የሟቹን ወታደር ህልፈት በይፋ አረጋግጧል።
oromo: Dilbata darbe kaaba Iraaq keessatti loltuun Ameerikaa tokko meeshaalee waraanaa xiyyara gadi kuffifamee keessaa hafan duwwaa gochuuf yaalii taasisaa jiruun lubbuun isaa darbeera. Loltuun kun xiyyara malee kan bilbilu (drone) kan Iraan irraa dhufee kufan sana miidhaa akka hin geessisneef tarkaanfii fudhachaa osoo jiruu balaan kun mudate. Ajajni waraana Ameerikaa (CENTCOM) du'a loltuu kanaa mirkaneesseera.

title: Israeli settlers injure elderly Palestinian man near Hebron
english: Israeli settlers assaulted an elderly Palestinian man and other residents with clubs in the town of Surif, located near Hebron in the West Bank. In a separate event, settlers also damaged farmland and crops by driving cattle through fields owned by a local farmer. Regional officials have reported a concerning rise in violent incidents and property destruction by settlers against Palestinian communities in this area.
amharic: በዌስት ባንክ ሄብሮን አቅራቢያ በሚገኘው ሱሪፍ ከተማ የእስራኤል ሰፋሪዎች አረጋዊን ጨምሮ በበርካታ ፍልስጤማውያን ላይ ድብደባ ፈጽመዋል። በሌላ በኩል ደግሞ ሰፋሪዎች ከብቶችን በለማ መሬት ላይ በማሰማራት የአንድን አርሶ አደር ሰብል እና የፍራፍሬ ዛፎች አውድመዋል። የፍልስጤም ባለስልጣናት በሄብሮን አካባቢ በሰፋሪዎች የሚፈጸሙ የጥቃት እና የንብረት ውድመት ድርጊቶች እየጨመሩ መምጣታቸውን አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Godina Hebron, mandara Surif keessatti, qubsattoonni Israa'el namoota Falisxiin irratti, keessattuu jaarsa tokko irratti, ulee fayyadamuun miidhaa geessisaniiru. Kana malees, qubsattoonni kun beeyladoota isaanii qonnaa qonnaan bulaa tokkoo irratti gadhiisuun midhaan isaanii fi mukkeen muduraa mancaasaniiru. Aantota Falisxiin akka ibsanitti, qubsattoonni kun godinicha keessatti namoota irratti haleellaa raawwachuu fi qabeenya isaanii mancaasuu dabalaa dhufaniiru.

title: The story behind Gaza’s #TheyLiedToYou campaign
english: Palestinians have initiated the #TheyLiedToYou social media campaign to contest the claim that the conflict in Gaza has concluded. The movement seeks to highlight that Israeli military operations continue despite reports of a ceasefire. Participants aim to expose the reality of the ongoing violence and challenge official narratives regarding the current state of the war.
amharic: ፍልስጤማውያን በጋዛ ያለው ጦርነት መጠናቀቁን የሚገልጸውን የተሳሳተ መረጃ ለመቃወም #TheyLiedToYou የተሰኘ ዘመቻ ጀምረዋል። ይህ እንቅስቃሴ የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት ቢኖርም የእስራኤል ወታደራዊ ጥቃት አሁንም እንዳልቆመ ለማሳየት ያለመ ነው። ተሳታፊዎቹ በጦርነቱ ላይ እየተሰራጨ ያለውን የተሳሳተ መረጃ በማጋለጥ እውነታውን ለዓለም ለማድረስ ይፈልጋሉ።
oromo: Warraaqsi #TheyLiedToYou jedhamu kan jalqabame, waraanni Gaaza keessatti geggeeffamaa jiru dhaabbateera kan jedhu oduun sobaa akka sirreeffamuufi. Namoonni duula kana keessatti hirmaatan, waraanni Israa'el gargaarsaafi tasgabbii jiraatu iyyuu ammallee akka itti fufu ibsaniiru. Kaayyoon guddaan duulichaa dhugaa jiru ifa baasuufi oduu sobaa waraana kanarratti babal'atu mormuudha.

title: Lebanese food influencer sentenced to life for drug smuggling
english: A popular Lebanese food influencer known as Dr. Food has been sentenced to life in prison with hard labor for smuggling large quantities of hashish. The drugs were discovered hidden inside cake packaging that was shipped internationally from Lebanon to Turkey. As he is currently believed to be outside of the country, he was sentenced in absentia and stripped of his civil rights.
amharic: ዶክተር ፉድ በሚል ስም የሚታወቀው የሊባኖስ የምግብ ኢንፍሉዌንሰር በከፍተኛ መጠን ሃሺሽ አደንዛዥ ዕፅ ሲያዘዋውር በመገኘቱ ዕድሜ ልክ ፅኑ እስራት ተፈርዶበታል። አደንዛዥ ዕፁ በሊባኖስ በሚመረቱ የኬክ ማሸጊያዎች ውስጥ ተደብቆ ወደ ውጭ አገር ሲላክ ነበር የተያዘው። ተከሳሹ በአሁኑ ወቅት ከሀገር ውጭ እንደሚገኝ ስለሚገመት ፍርዱ የተላለፈበት በሌለበት ሲሆን፣ የዜግነት መብቱም ተገፎበታል።
oromo: Dr. Food jedhamuun kan beekamu fi lammii Liibaanoos kan ta'e namni beekamaan kun, qoricha sammuu namaa hadoochu (hashish) seeraan alaa gara biyyoota biraatti ergaa ture jechuun hidhaa cimaa fi umrii guutuun adabameera. Qorichi kun kan argame keekii keessatti dhoksamee gara biyya Turkiitti ergaa utuu jiruu dha. Namni kun amma biyya keessa waan hin jirreef, maqaa isaa qofaan murteen kun itti muramee mirgi lammummaa isaas irraa fudhatameera.

title: ‘Sacred unity’: Iran’s supreme leader calls for calm amid political divides
english: Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has urged the nation to remain united and avoid political infighting during the ongoing conflict with the United States. This call for solidarity follows internal backlash from hardline supporters who accused government officials of treason for signing a recent agreement with Washington. By promoting national cohesion, the leadership aims to prevent perceived weakness and maintain a strong front against foreign adversaries.
amharic: የኢራኑ ከፍተኛ መሪ ሞጅታባ ካሜኔይ ከአሜሪካ ጋር ባለው ውጥረት መካከል ህዝቡ በአንድነት እንዲቆም እና የውስጥ የፖለቲካ ልዩነቶችን እንዲያቆም ጥሪ አቅርበዋል። ይህ የሰላም ጥሪ የመጣው ከአሜሪካ ጋር በተፈረመው ስምምነት የተበሳጩ የመንግስት ደጋፊዎች ባለስልጣናትን ክህደት ፈጽመዋል በማለት መክሰሳቸውን ተከትሎ ነው። አመራሩ ብሄራዊ አንድነትን በማጠናከር ለውጭ ጠላቶች የድክመት ምልክት ላለማሳየት እየሰራ ይገኛል።
oromo: Hoggantoonni olaanoo Iraan Mojtaba Khamenei walitti bu'iinsa Ameerikaa waliin qaban keessatti biyyi tokkummaa akka jabeeysituufi wal-dhabdee siyaasaa akka dhiistu waamicha dhiyeessaniiru. Waamichi kun kan dhufe, deggartoonni mootummaa cimaan walii-galtee Ameerikaa waliin mallatteeffame irratti mufatanii qondaaltota mootummaa yakka gantummaatiin himachuu isaanii hordofeeti. Hoggantoonni kun tokkummaa biyyaalessaa cimsuun diina biratti laafina akka hin mul'isneef yaalii gochaa jiru.

title: At least 50 Malian soldiers killed in attack on military convoy
english: A joint military convoy carrying Malian soldiers and Russian Africa Corps personnel was ambushed in northern Mali near Anefis, resulting in at least 50 deaths. Tuareg separatist groups and militants affiliated with al-Qaeda have both claimed responsibility for the deadly attack. Evidence from the scene, including video footage, confirms the destruction of military equipment and casualties among the troops.
