amharic: በሰሜን ማሊ በአኔፊስ አቅራቢያ በማሊ ጦር እና በሩሲያ አፍሪካ ኮርፕስ የጋራ ወታደራዊ ተሽከርካሪዎች ላይ በተፈጸመ አድፍጦ ጥቃት ቢያንስ 50 ወታደሮች ተገድለዋል። የቱዋሬግ ነንጣይ ቡድኖች እና ከአልቃይዳ ጋር ግንኙነት ያላቸው ታጣቂዎች ለጥቃቱ ኃላፊነቱን ወስደዋል። በቦታው የተወሰዱ ምስሎች እንደሚያሳዩት በወታደራዊ ተሽከርካሪዎች ላይ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት ደርሶ ወታደሮችም ተገድለዋል።
oromo: Kaaba Maalii keessatti bakka Anefis jedhamutti konvoyii waraana Maalii fi humnoota Raashiyaa (Africa Corps) irratti haleellaa tasaa raawwatameen loltootni 50 ol ta'an ajjeefamaniiru. Gareeleen adda ba'uu barbaadan kan Tuwareeg fi shororkeessitoonni garee al-Qaa'idaa wal ta'uun haleellaa kana raawwachuu isaanii ibsaniiru. Suuraa fi viidiyoon bakka haleellaa sanaa irraa argame akka agarsiisutti, meeshaaleen waraanaa barbadaa'anii fi loltootni hedduun du'uu isaanii mirkaneesseera.

title: Lebanon’s President Joseph Aoun meets Rubio ahead of Trump talks
english: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun has arrived in Washington for high-level meetings, starting with Secretary of State Marco Rubio, to discuss ending the conflict between Israel and Hezbollah. He plans to meet President Donald Trump to advocate for the enforcement of a June 26 peace agreement that requires the withdrawal of Israeli troops and the disarmament of Hezbollah. This historic visit seeks to secure American support for restoring Lebanese sovereignty and stabilizing the southern region.
amharic: የሊባኖስ ፕሬዝዳንት ጆሴፍ አውን በእስራኤል እና በሂዝቦላህ መካከል ያለውን ግጭት ለማስቆም ከዩናይትድ ስቴትስ የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር ማርኮ ሩቢዮ ጋር ለመወያየት ዋሽንግተን ገብተዋል። ፕሬዝዳንቱ ከፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ ጋር ተገናኝተው ሰኔ 26 የተፈረመውን የእርቅ ስምምነት እንዲተገበር እና የእስራኤል ወታደሮች ከደቡብ ሊባኖስ እንዲወጡ ለመጠየቅ አቅደዋል። ይህ ጉብኝት የሊባኖስን ሉዓላዊነት ለማስከበር እና በደቡባዊው የሀገሪቱ ክፍል ሰላም ለመፍጠር የአሜሪካን ድጋፍ ለማግኘት ያለመ ነው።
oromo: Pirezidaantiin Libaanoos Jooseef Aawun waldhabdee Israaʼelii fi Hizbullaah gidduu jiru dhaabsiisuuf marii taasisuuf gara Waashingitan dhaqaniiru. Pirezidaantiin sun pirezidaant Doonaald Tiraamp waliin mariʼachuun, waligaltee nagaa jiʼa Waxabajjii 26 mallatteeffame hojiirra oolchuuf akkasumas waraanni Israaʼel kibba Libaanoos irraa akka baʼu gaafachuuf karoorfataniiru. Daawwannaan kun biyyattii keessatti mootummaa fi nageenya mirkaneessuuf deeggarsa Ameerikaa argachuuf kan gargaaruudha.

title: ICC’s Khan probe ‘reduced to political referendum’, Palestinian rights groups warn
english: Major Palestinian human rights groups have expressed concern that the disciplinary investigation into ICC prosecutor Karim Khan is being influenced by politics. They argue that the current process lacks proper legal fairness and threatens the court's independence ahead of a crucial vote on his future. These organizations believe the flawed proceedings set a dangerous precedent that undermines the rule of law.
amharic: የፍልስጤም የሰብአዊ መብት ድርጅቶች የዓለም አቀፉ የወንጀለኞች ፍርድ ቤት ዋና አቃቤ ህግ ካሪም ካን ላይ እየተካሄደ ያለው የዲሲፕሊን ምርመራ በፖለቲካ ተጽዕኖ የተሞላ መሆኑን ገለጹ። ድርጅቶቹ አሁን ያለው ሂደት የህግ የበላይነትን የሚጻረር እና የፍርድ ቤቱን ገለልተኝነት አደጋ ላይ የሚጥል ነው ብለዋል። በካሪም ካን የወደፊት እጣ ፈንታ ላይ ድምጽ ከመሰጠቱ በፊት፣ ይህ አሰራር ለፍትህ ሂደት ስጋት መሆኑን አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Gumiiwwan mirga namoomaa Falasxiin kanneen ijoo ta'an, qorannoon adabbii abbaa alangaa Mana Murtii Yakka Addunyaa Karim Kaan irratti gaggeeffamaa jiru dhiibbaa siyaasaa keessa akka jiru ibsaniiru. Adeemsi amma jiru kun seeraan ala fi walaba ta'uu mana murtichaa kan miidhu akka ta'e dubbatu. Kaan irratti murtoon dhumaa utuu hin kennamin dura, adeemsi kun kabajamuu seeraa fi mirga namoomaa irratti balaa akka qabu akeekkachiisaniiru.

title: Iraqi-born singer Emmanuel Kelly among World Cup half-time show headliners
english: Iraqi-born singer Emmanuel Kelly is set to perform at the World Cup half-time show alongside major global stars like Shakira and Madonna. Kelly was abandoned as an infant in Baghdad with underdeveloped limbs before being adopted by an Australian humanitarian who helped him receive life-changing medical care. Since overcoming these early hardships, he has built a career as a musician and inspirational figure, having previously gained fame on The X Factor.
amharic: በኢራቅ የተወለደው ዘፋኝ አማኑኤል ኬሊ እንደ ሻኪራ እና ማዶና ባሉ ዓለም አቀፍ ኮከቦች የታጀበው የዓለም ዋንጫ የዕረፍት ጊዜ ትርኢት ላይ እንዲዘፍን ተመርጧል። አማኑኤል በጨቅላነቱ በባግዳድ ጎዳና ላይ የተገኘው የአካል ጉዳት ያለበት ልጅ ሲሆን፣ በአውስትራሊያዊት በጎ አድራጊ እናት ተቀብሎ በማደጉ የህክምና ዕርዳታ አግኝቷል። አስቸጋሪ የህይወት ታሪኩን በማለፍ በሙዚቃው ዓለም ስኬታማ የሆኑት አማኑኤል፣ ቀደም ሲል በኤክስ ፋክተር የቴሌቪዥን ፕሮግራም በመሳተፍ ይታወቃል።
oromo: Weellisaan biyya Iraaq keessatti dhalatee fi biyya Awustiraaliyaa jiraatu Immaanu'eel Keelii, sagantaa boqonnaa tapha Waancaa Addunyaa irratti akka weellisuuf filatameera. Immaanu'eel mucummaa isaatti miilaa fi harka guutuu hin qabne ta'ee Baagdaad keessatti gatamee erga argamee booda, harmee tola ooltuu Awustiraaliyaa tokkoon fudhatamee wal'ansa fayyaa barbaachisaa argateera. Jireenya isaa kan darbe keessatti rakkoo hedduu keessa darbee kan guddate guyyaa har'aa muuziqaan beekamtii argachaa jiru kun, kanaan dura sagantaa 'The X Factor' irratti dhiyaatee beekamuun isaa ni yaadatama.

title: Iraqi PM to visit Tehran this week, Iraqi state news agency says
english: Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi is scheduled to travel to Tehran in the coming days. During this official trip, he plans to finalize several agreements aimed at strengthening collaboration between Iraq and Iran. This visit highlights the ongoing diplomatic efforts to enhance ties between the two neighboring nations.
amharic: የኢራቅ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አሊ አል-ዛይዲ በቅርቡ ወደ ተህራን ጉዞ እንደሚያደርጉ ተገልጿል። በዚህ ይፋዊ ጉብኝት ወቅት በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለውን ትብብር ለማጠናከር የሚያስችሉ የተለያዩ የመግባቢያ ሰነዶችን ይፈራረማሉ ተብሎ ይጠበቃል። ጉብኝቱ በኢራቅ እና በኢራን መካከል ያለውን ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ግንኙነት ለማሳደግ ያለመ ነው።
oromo: Muummeen Ministira Iraaq Alii al-Zaydi guyyoota dhufan keessatti gara Teheran akka imalan gabaafameera. Imala kana keessatti, walitti dhufeenya biyyoota lamaanii cimsuuf waliigalteewwan gara garaa akka mallatteessan eegama. Imalli kun hariiroo dippilomaasii Iraaqi fi Iraan gidduu jiru caalaatti cimsuuf kan yaadame dha.

title: Kuwait condemns what it calls Iranian attack on power, water desalination facility
english: The Kuwaiti government has officially denounced a recent assault on a crucial power and water plant, attributing the incident to Iran. Officials stated that targeting essential civilian infrastructure is a serious violation of international law and poses a significant threat to regional stability. Kuwait holds Iran fully accountable for the damages and legal implications resulting from this aggression.
amharic: የኩዌት መንግስት በቅርቡ በኤሌክትሪክ እና በውሃ ማጣሪያ ተቋም ላይ የተፈጸመውን ጥቃት በይፋ አውግዟል። ኩዌት ለዚህ ጥቃት ኢራንን ተጠያቂ ያደረገች ሲሆን ድርጊቱም ዓለም አቀፍ ህግን የጣሰ አደገኛ ቅስቀሳ እንደሆነ አስታውቃለች። ለዜጎች አስፈላጊ የሆኑ መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ ኢላማ ማድረግ የዓለም አቀፍ ስምምነቶችን የሚጻረር ነው ብላለች።
oromo: Mootummaan Kuweyt miidhaa bu'uuraalee misoomaa kan ta'an mana ibsaa fi qulqulleessituu bishaanirratti qaqqabe balaaleffateera. Kuweyt weerara kana kan raawwate Iraan ta'uu ibsuun, gochi kun seera idil-addunyaa kan cabsuu fi nageenya naannichaa kan boreesu ta'uu hubachiisteerti. Mootummaan Kuweyt miidhaa qaqqabe hundaaf ittigaafatamummaan kan Iraan ta'uu beeksisteerti.

title: Jordan summons Iranian diplomat over 'unjustified' attacks, ministry says
english: Jordan officially summoned a top Iranian diplomat to protest recent hostile actions and inflammatory remarks directed at the country. The Jordanian government condemned these acts as unjustified violations of their national territory. Through this formal measure, Amman is demanding an end to the provocative behavior currently straining diplomatic relations.
amharic: ዮርዳኖስ በቅርቡ በሀገሪቱ ላይ የተፈጸሙ ጥቃቶችን እና የተሰነዘሩ ቅስቀሳዎችን በመቃወም ከፍተኛ የኢራን ዲፕሎማትን ጠርታለች። የዮርዳኖስ የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስቴር እነዚህን ድርጊቶች ያለ ምክንያት የተፈጸሙ እና የሀገሪቱን ሉዓላዊነት የሚጋፉ እንደሆኑ ገልጿል። በዚህም መሰረት አምማን ከኢራን በኩል እየደረሰ ያለውን ትንኮሳ እንዲያቆም አጥብቃ ትጠይቃለች።
oromo: Yordaanoos tarkaanfiiwwan diinummaa fi ibsoota hammeenya qaban kan biyyattii irratti xiyyeeffatan mormuuf, jila biyya Iraan kan ta'e ofiisaa waamteetti. Ministeerri dhimma alaa Yordaanoos gochoota kunneen bu'ura kan hin qabnee fi kabajamuu qabeenya biyyattii kan sarban ta'uu ibseera. Tarkaanfii kana fudhachuun, mootummaan Yordaanoos qeequu fi tuttuqqii gaggeeffamaa jiru akka dhaabu biyya Iraan gaafachaa jira.

title: Syria’s Al-Sharaa reshuffles security and intelligence leadership
english: Syrian President Ahmed al-Sharaa has reorganized the country’s security and intelligence leadership to consolidate government control. Interior Minister Anas Khattab has been granted expanded authority by taking over the National Security Bureau, which now oversees the General Intelligence Service. Officials claim these strategic changes are intended to improve national stability and facilitate ongoing reconstruction efforts following the end of the previous regime.
amharic: የሶሪያው ፕሬዝዳንት አህመድ አል-ሻራ የሀገሪቱን የደህንነት እና የኢንተለጀንስ መዋቅር በመቀያየር የመንግስትን ቁጥጥር ለማጠናከር ወስነዋል። የሀገር ውስጥ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትሩ አናስ ካታብ አዲስ በተቋቋመው የብሄራዊ ደህንነት ቢሮ ላይ ስልጣን በመያዝ አጠቃላይ የደህንነት ተቋማትን በበላይነት እንዲመሩ ተደርጓል። መንግስት ይህ እርምጃ የሀገሪቱን ሰላም ለማስጠበቅ እና ከቀድሞው አገዛዝ በኋላ የጀመረውን የመልሶ ግንባታ ስራ ለማፋጠን ያለመ መሆኑን ገልጿል።
oromo: Pireezidaantiin Siiriyaa Ahmed Al-Sharaa mootummaan isaanii to'annoo isaa cimsuuf jecha caasaa nageenyaa fi basaastuu biyyattii irra deebi'anii gurmeessaniiru. Ministirri Dhimma Keessaa Anas Kattaab itti gaafatamummaa Biiroo Nageenya Biyyoolessaa dabalatee dhaabbilee nageenyaa hunda to'achuuf aangoon kennameeraaf. Mootummaan jijjiirraa kana kan godhe nageenya biyyattii mirkaneessuu fi hojiiwwan ijaarsa biyyaa kan kanaan dura ture sana booda jiru ariifachiisuuf akka ta'e ibseera.

title: Israeli settlers torch homes and mosque in Masafer Yatta
english: Israeli settlers recently attacked the Palestinian village of al Tuwani in Masafer Yatta, setting fire to homes, vehicles, and a local mosque. Reports indicate that Israeli military forces were present and provided protection to the attackers during the violence. This assault has caused significant destruction within the community located south of Hebron.
amharic: የእስራኤል ሰፋሪዎች በደቡብ ሄብሮን በሚገኘው ማሳፈር ያታ አል-ቱዋኒ በተባለ የፍልስጤም መንደር ላይ ጥቃት በመሰንዘር መኖሪያ ቤቶችን፣ ተሽከርካሪዎችን እና መስጊድን በእሳት አቃጥለዋል። እንደ ፍልስጤም መገናኛ ብዙሃን ዘገባ፣ ጥቃቱ በሚፈጸምበት ወቅት የእስራኤል ወታደሮች ለሰፋሪዎቹ ጥበቃ ሲያደርጉላቸው ነበር። ይህ ድርጊት በአካባቢው ነዋሪዎች ላይ ከፍተኛ ውድመት አስከትሏል።
oromo: Qotee bulaan Israa'el ganda Falasxiin kan Masaafar Yaattaa keessatti argamu Al-Tuwanii irratti haleellaa raawwataniiru. Haleellaa kanaan manneen jireenyaa, konkolaattotaa fi masjiidi tokko gubataniiru. Gabaasni miidiyaaleen Falasxiin akka ibsutti, yeroo haleellaan kun raawwatamu humnoonni waraana Israa'el qotee bulaa kanaaf eegumsa gochaa turan.

title: 5.6 magnitude earthquake hits Peru
english: A 5.6 magnitude earthquake recently struck a region in central Peru. The tremors, which occurred at a depth of 22 kilometers, caused significant structural damage to buildings. Emergency response teams are currently searching for individuals reported missing within the debris of collapsed structures.
amharic: በመካከለኛው ፔሩ በቅርቡ የ5.6 ማግኒቱድ መጠን ያለው የመሬት መንቀጥቀጥ ተከስቷል። ከምድር በታች 22 ኪሎ ሜትር ጥልቀት ላይ የተከሰተው ይህ አደጋ በህንፃዎች ላይ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት አድርሷል። የአደጋ ጊዜ ሰራተኞች በፈራረሱ ቤቶች ፍርስራሽ ውስጥ የጠፉ ሰዎችን የመፈለግ ስራ እያከናወኑ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Giddu galeessa biyya Peeruu keessatti lafti socho'ee guddinna 5.6 kan qabu mudatee jira. Sochiin lafaa kun gad fageenya kiiloo meetira 22 irraa kan ka'e yoo ta'u, mannoota hedduu irratti miidhaa guddaa qaqqabsiiseera. Gareen gargaarsa hatattamaa diigama mannootaa keessatti namoota badee jiru barbaaduuf tattaaffii gochaa jiru.

title: Israel uses law to destroy Palestinian education in East Jerusalem
english: The Israeli government is implementing new legislation and aggressive oversight to undermine the Palestinian education system in East Jerusalem. A recent law prohibits teachers who graduated from Palestinian universities in the West Bank from working in the city, citing ideological and security concerns. Critics argue that these measures are intended to force the 'Israelisation' of Palestinian students while severely destabilizing a school system already facing major teacher shortages.
amharic: የእስራኤል መንግስት በምስራቅ እየሩሳሌም የሚገኘውን የፍልስጤማውያን የትምህርት ስርዓት ለማዳከም አዳዲስ ህጎችን በማውጣት እና ጥብቅ ቁጥጥር በማድረግ ላይ ይገኛል። በቅርቡ በወጣው ህግ መሰረት፣ በምዕራብ ባንክ ከሚገኙ የፍልስጤም ዩኒቨርሲቲዎች የተመረቁ መምህራን በከተማዋ እንዳያስተምሩ ታግደዋል። ይህ እርምጃ የፍልስጤም ተማሪዎችን ለማስገደድ እና ቀድሞውንም የመምህራን እጥረት ያለበትን የትምህርት ስርዓት ለማፈራረስ ያለመ መሆኑን ተቺዎች ይናገራሉ።
oromo: Mootummaan Israa'el sirna barnoota Falasxiinotaa kan Baha Yerusaalem keessa jiru dadhabsiisuuf seerota haaraa baasee hojii irra oolchaa jira. Seerri dhiheenya kana bahe barsiisota yuunivarsiitiiwwan Falasxiin kan Lixa Baankii (West Bank) irraa eebbifaman magaalattii keessatti barsiisuu akka hin dandeenye dhorka. Qeeqtonni akka jedhanitti, tarkaanfiin kun barattoota Falasxiinotaa 'Israa'eloomsuuf' fi sirna barnootaa barsiisota gahaa hin qabne kana guutummaatti diiguuf kan yaadame dha.

title: Kimi Antonelli wins Belgian Grand Prix to extend F1 championship lead
english: Mercedes driver Kimi Antonelli secured his sixth victory of the season at the Belgian Grand Prix, strengthening his lead in the Formula One championship. His closest competitor, teammate George Russell, was forced to retire early following a first-lap collision with Lewis Hamilton. With this win at Spa-Francorchamps, Antonelli has established a significant 50-point cushion over Russell as he continues his dominant performance this year.
amharic: የመርሴዲስ አሽከርካሪው ኪሚ አንቶኔሊ በቤልጂየም ግራንድ ፕሪክስ አሸንፎ በፎርሙላ ዋን የውድድር ዘመን መሪነቱን አጠናክሯል። ለዋንጫ ዋና ተፎካካሪው የነበረው የቡድን አጋሩ ጆርጅ ራሰል ከውድድሩ መጀመሪያ ላይ ከሌዊስ ሀሚልተን ጋር ተጋጭቶ ከውድድር ውጪ ሆኗል። በዚህ ድል አንቶኔሊ በራሰል ላይ የ50 ነጥብ ብልጫ በመውሰድ በዘንድሮው የውድድር ዘመን የበላይነቱን አስመስክሯል።
oromo: Ogeessi konkolaataa Mercedes Kimi Antonelli injifannoo isaa jahaffaa qophii Belgian Grand Prix irratti galmeessuun sadarkaa dursaa qabatee jiru cimseera. Dorgomaan isaa inni guddaan George Russell, jalqaba dorgommii sanaa irratti Lewis Hamilton wajjin walitti bu'uun dorgommii keessaa ba'eera. Injifannoo Spa-Francorchamps kanaan, Antonelli qabxii 50-n George Russell caaluun yeroo ammaa dorgommii kana dursee jira.

title: Designing cities for a hotter future
english: Climate expert and architect Mina Hasman is proposing a revolutionary approach to urban planning that mimics natural ecosystems. She advocates for designing cities that function like forests and buildings that operate like trees to better withstand rising global temperatures. This strategy emphasizes creating climate-resilient spaces where urban development works in harmony with the natural environment.
amharic: የአየር ንብረት ተመራማሪ እና አርክቴክት ሚና ሃስማን ከተሞችን ከተፈጥሮ ጋር በሚስማማ መልኩ ዲዛይን ማድረግ እንደሚገባ ይናገራሉ። እሳቸው እንደሚጠቁሙት ህንጻዎች እንደ ዛፍ የሚያገለግሉበት እና ከተሞች እንደ ጫካ የሚሰሩበትን የአሰራር ስልት መከተል ለከፍተኛ የአየር ሙቀት መፍትሄ ይሆናል። ይህ አካሄድ በከተማ ልማት እና በተፈጥሮ መካከል ያለውን ግንኙነት በማጠናከር ዘላቂ የሆነ የከተማ ኑሮን ለመገንባት ያለመ ነው።
oromo: Hayyuun jijjiirama qilleensaa fi arkiiteektiin Mina Hasman, magaalota akka uumamatti bocuun barbaachisaa ta'uu dubbatu. Innis magaalota akka bosonaatti, akkasumas gamoo akka mukaatti hojjetan ijaaruun, miidhaa hoo'i lafaa dabalaa dhufe hir'isuuf gargaara jedhu. Karoorri kun, gamoo fi naannawa magaalaa uumama waliin kan walsimatan taasisuun qilleensa gaariifi tasgabbaa'aa ta'e uumuuf kan gumaachuudha.

title: Tate brothers arrested in the US
english: Controversial influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate were taken into custody in Miami, Florida. These arrests follow new legal actions from UK authorities, who have filed 38 additional charges against the pair. In total, the brothers now face 59 accusations involving rape and sex trafficking.
amharic: ታዋቂዎቹ ወንድማማቾች አንድሪው እና ትሪስታን ታይት በአሜሪካ ማያሚ ከተማ በቁጥጥር ስር ውለዋል። ይህ እስር የተፈጸመው የዩኬ አቃቤ ህጎች በሁለቱ ላይ 38 አዳዲስ ክሶችን ከመሰረቱ በኋላ ነው። በአጠቃላይ ወንድማማቾቹ በአሁኑ ወቅት በአስገድዶ መድፈር እና በሰዎች ዝውውር ወንጀል የተጠረጠሩባቸው የክስ ብዛት 59 ደርሷል።
oromo: Obboloonni beekamoon Andrew fi Tristan Tate magaalaan Maayamii, biyya Ameerikaatti qabamaniiru. Hidhaan kun kan dhufey erga abbaan alangaa UK himannaa haaraa 38 ta'u isaan irratti bananii boodadha. Walumaagalatti obboloonni kun amma himannaa 59 kanneen dirqisiisanii gudeeduu fi daldala namootaa waliin walqabatan irratti banamee jira.

title: Rubio meets Lebanon's president, discusses Israel-Lebanon framework agreement
english: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio held talks with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun regarding the enforcement of a peace framework between Israel and Lebanon. During the meeting, Rubio expressed his support for the Lebanese government's initiatives to disarm Hezbollah. He also recognized the leadership of the president for his commitment to ending the ongoing conflict.
amharic: የአሜሪካው የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር ማርኮ ሩቢዮ በእስራኤል እና በሊባኖስ መካከል የተደረሰውን የሰላም ስምምነት ተግባራዊ ለማድረግ ከሊባኖስ ፕሬዝዳንት ጆሴፍ ኦውን ጋር ተወያይተዋል። በውይይቱም ሩቢዮ የሊባኖስ መንግስት ሂዝቦላህን ትጥቅ ለማስፈታት እያደረገ ያለውን ጥረት አድንቀዋል። በተጨማሪም ግጭቱን ለማቆም ፕሬዝዳንቱ እያሳዩት ያለውን አመራር አወድሰዋል።
oromo: Ministirri Dhimma Alaa Ameerikaa Maarkoo Ruubiyoon, waliigaltee nageenyaa Israa'el fi Libaanoos gidduutti mallatteeffame hojiirra oolchuurratti pirezidaantii Libaanoos Jooseef Awun waliin mari'ataniiru. Marii kana irratti, Ruubiyoon mootummaan Libaanoos garee Hizbullaah hidha hiiksisuuf carraaqqii taasisaa jiru galateeffataniiru. Akkasumas, pirezidaantichi waraana dhaabsisuuf qophii ta'uu isaanii cimsanii ibsaniiru.

title: Iran accuses US of violating international law after strike on nuclear plant
english: Iran's nuclear agency has publicly condemned the United States for launching an airstrike against the construction site of the Darkhovin nuclear facility. Officials labeled the attack an illegal act of aggression that undermines Iran's pursuit of energy independence. While the specific impact of the bombing remains undisclosed, the organization insists the move violates international law.
amharic: የኢራን የኒውክሌር ኃይል ድርጅት አሜሪካ በዳርኮቪን የኒውክሌር ኃይል ማመንጫ ግንባታ ቦታ ላይ የአየር ጥቃት ማድረሷን አጥብቆ አውግዟል። ድርጅቱ ጥቃቱ የኢራንን ሉዓላዊነት የሚጋፋ እና ዓለም አቀፍ ህግን የጣሰ ህገ-ወጥ ድርጊት መሆኑን ገልጿል። በቦታው ላይ የደረሰው የጉዳት መጠን በግልጽ ባይታወቅም፣ ኢራን ይህንን ድርጊት የኃይል አገዛዝ እና የጥቃት ሙከራ ሲል ወቅሳለች።
oromo: Dhaabbanni anniisaa niukilaraa Iraan, gama mootummaa Ameerikaatiin iddoo ijaarsa buufata anniisaa niukilaraa Darkhovin irratti haleellaan raawwatamee jiraachuu ibsuun balaaleeffatte. Iraan haleellaa kana kan ibsite akka seeraan alaatti fi uummata isaanii irratti kan raawwatame akka ta’e dha. Gahuumsi miidhaa haleellaa kanaan gahee ifa kan hin taane yoo ta’u, mootummaan Iraan tarkaanfichii seera idil-addunyaa cabsuu isaa ibsitee jirti.

title: Lebanon death toll rises
english: The Lebanese Health Ministry has reported a significant increase in casualties following recent Israeli military strikes. Since March 2, the conflict has resulted in 4,328 deaths and left more than 12,000 people injured. These figures highlight the severe humanitarian impact of the ongoing regional violence.
amharic: የሊባኖስ ጤና ጥበቃ ሚኒስቴር ከእስራኤል በተሰነዘሩ ጥቃቶች ሳቢያ ከፍተኛ የሰው ህይወት መጥፋቱን አስታውቋል። ከመጋቢት 2 ቀን ጀምሮ በተካሄዱት ጥቃቶች 4,328 ሰዎች ሲሞቱ ከ12,000 በላይ የሚሆኑት ደግሞ የአካል ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። ይህ መረጃ በክልሉ እየተካሄደ ያለው ግጭት እያስከተለ ያለውን ከፍተኛ የሰብአዊ ቀውስ የሚያሳይ ነው።
oromo: Ministeerri Fayyaa Libaanoos weerara Israa'eel raawwateen walqabatee namoota hedduun du'uu isaa ibseera. Muddee 2 irraa eegalee, haleellaa kanaan namoonni 4,328 du'anii, namoonni 12,000 ol ta'an ammoo madaa'aniiru. Lakkoofsi kun walitti bu'iinsa naannichatti adeemaa jiru miidhaa namoomaa cimaa geessisaa akka jiru agarsiisa.

title: Iran's military says it destroyed US drone
english: The Iranian military claims that its naval defense forces successfully shot down a United States-produced Lucas drone. While state media released an image of the wreckage, these reports have not been confirmed by independent sources. The drone in question is a domestic American variant of the low-cost Shahed suicide drone typically used in attacks.
amharic: የኢራን ወታደራዊ ኃይል የአሜሪካ ሰራሽ የሆነ ሉካስ የተሰኘ ድሮን በባህር ኃይል የአየር መከላከያ ስርዓቱ መትቶ መጣሉን አስታውቋል። የኢራን መንግስት የመገናኛ ብዙኃን የተጎዳውን ድሮን ምስል ይፋ ያደረጉ ቢሆንም፣ ይህ መረጃ ገለልተኛ በሆኑ አካላት አልተረጋገጠም። የተጠቀሰው ድሮን በአሜሪካ የሚመረተው የሻሄድ አይነት ርካሽ የጥቃት ድሮን መሆኑም ተገልጿል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyyaa Iraan, diroonii Ameerikaa irraa hojjetame kan 'Lucas' jedhamu humna ittisa qilleensaa galaanaa isaanin rukutamee akka kufu godhameera jedhe. Miidiyaan biyyattii suuraa diroonichi miidhamee jiru tokko gadi lakkiseera, ta'us oduun kun maddoota walaba ta'aniin mirkanaa'uu hin dandeenye. Diroonichi kun kan 'Shahed' jedhamu kan gatiin isaa madaalawaa ta'e fi weeraraaf oolu kan Ameerikaan hojjatte akka ta'e himameera.

title: The 1975's Matty Healy marries model Gabbriette Bechtel in Los Angeles
english: Matty Healy, the lead singer of the band The 1975, has married model Gabbriette Bechtel during a private ceremony in Los Angeles. The couple, who got engaged earlier this year after dating for nine months, held their wedding at a famous Hollywood Hills estate with friends and family present. Their celebration follows several months of public courtship that began shortly after Healy’s short-lived relationship with Taylor Swift.
amharic: የ The 1975 ባንድ መሪ ዘፋኝ ማቲ ሂሊ እና ሞዴል ጋብሪዬት ቤቸል በሎስ አንጀለስ በተደረገ የግል ስነ-ስርዓት ተጋብተዋል። ጥንዶቹ ለዘጠኝ ወራት ከተገናኙ በኋላ በዚህ አመት መጀመሪያ ላይ መተጫጨታቸውን ይፋ ያደረጉ ሲሆን፣ ሰርጋቸውንም በሆሊውድ ሂልስ በሚገኝ ታዋቂ መኖሪያ ቤት በቅርብ ቤተሰቦቻቸውና ጓደኞቻቸው ታጅበው አከናውነዋል። ይህ ጋብቻ የተፈፀመው ሂሊ ከቴይለር ስዊፍት ጋር የነበረውን ግንኙነት ካቋረጠ በኋላ ባሉት ወራት ውስጥ ነው።
oromo: Faarfataa garee muuziqaa The 1975 kan ta'e Matty Healy fi moodela Gabbriette Bechtel magaalota Los Anjeelesitti sirna cidha dhuunfaa ta'een wal fuudhaniiru. Namoonni kun ji'oota sagaliif waliin erga turanii booda bara kana jalqaba irratti wal fuudhuuf beeksisanii turan. Cidha isaanii kana manaa fi iddoo seenaa qabeessa kan ta'e Hollywood Hills keessatti maatii fi hiriyoota dhihoo isaanii waliin raawwataniiru.

title: Why is Argentina’s football team so white?
english: The national football team of Argentina is often noted for having a predominantly white roster, which stands out when compared to the diverse demographics of other South American nations. This phenomenon is frequently discussed in the context of Argentina's unique historical and social development. The article explores the underlying reasons why the composition of the team appears so different from its regional neighbors.
amharic: የአርጀንቲና ብሔራዊ እግር ኳስ ቡድን ከተቀሩት የደቡብ አሜሪካ ሀገራት በተለየ መልኩ ነጭ ተጫዋቾች በብዛት የሚታዩበት ቡድን በመሆኑ ትኩረትን ይስባል። ይህ ጉዳይ ከአርጀንቲና ታሪካዊ እና ማህበራዊ እድገት ጋር ተያይዞ በስፋት ይነሳል። ጽሁፉ የቡድኑ ስብጥር ከጎረቤት ሀገራት የተለየ እንዲሆን ያደረጉትን ምክንያቶች ይዳስሳል።
oromo: Garee kubbaa miillaa biyyoolessa Arjentiinaa keessatti taphattoonni halluu diimaa/adii qaban baay'achuun, biyyoota Ameerikaa Kibbaa kan biroo waliin yoo madaalamu adda ta'ee mul'ata. Haalli kun seenaa fi guddina hawaasummaa Arjentiinaa keessatti bal'inaan kan irratti mari'atamuudha. Barruun kun sababoota gurguddoo gareen kun biyyoota ollaa isaa irraa adda ta'ee itti mul'atu qorata.

title: Iran attacks US Gulf allies, causing a fire at Kuwait power plant
english: Iran has launched a series of missile and drone strikes against Kuwait and Bahrain, resulting in a fire at a Kuwaiti power and water plant. These attacks, which targeted areas hosting U.S. military assets, follow ongoing military escalations and retaliatory strikes between Iran and the United States. Additionally, an Iranian missile aimed at Jordan was successfully intercepted by joint defense efforts.
amharic: ኢራን በኩዌት እና በባህሬን ላይ ተከታታይ የሚሳኤል እና የድሮን ጥቃቶችን ያደረሰች ሲሆን በኩዌት የኤሌክትሪክ እና የውሃ ተቋም ላይም የእሳት አደጋ አስከትላለች። የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ጣቢያዎች ባሉባቸው አካባቢዎች ላይ ያነጣጠሩት እነዚህ ጥቃቶች፣ በኢራን እና በአሜሪካ መካከል እየተባባሰ የመጣውን ግጭት ተከትሎ የመጡ ናቸው። ከዚህም በላይ ወደ ዮርዳኖስ የተተኮሰ የኢራን ሚሳኤል በጋራ የመከላከያ ጥረቶች መክሸፉ ተገልጿል።
oromo: Iiraan Kuweytii fi Baahireynirratti miisaa'elii fi doroniin haleellaa gaggeessiteen, buufata ibsaa fi bishaanii Kuweyt tokkorratti ibidni ka'eera. Haleellaan kun bakkeewwan waraanni Ameerikaa keessa jiran irratti kan xiyyeeffate yoo ta'u, kunis waldhabdee Iiraanii fi Ameerikaa gidduutti cimaa dhufe hordofee kan dhufeedha. Kana malees, miisaa'elli Iiraan gara Yordaanositti furguggaafte, tumsa humnoota ittisaatiin karaa duubatti deebifameera.

title: Who controls football in Palestine?
english: Football in Palestine serves as more than just a sport, acting as a significant battleground for issues regarding land, identity, and national representation. Palestinians face ongoing challenges, including the threat of pitch demolitions in the West Bank and historical disputes over international recognition. These struggles highlight how the sport is deeply intertwined with the broader political fight against Israeli occupation.
amharic: በፍልስጤም እግር ኳስ ከጨዋታነት ባለፈ ስለ መሬት፣ ማንነት እና ብሔራዊ ውክልና የሚደረግበት ትልቅ የፖለቲካ መድረክ ነው። ፍልስጤማውያን በዌስት ባንክ የጨዋታ ሜዳዎች መፍረስ እና በዓለም አቀፍ ዕውቅና ላይ በሚነሱ ችግሮች ምክንያት ከፍተኛ ፈተናዎች ይገጥሟቸዋል። እነዚህ ተግዳሮቶች ስፖርቱ ከእስራኤል ወረራ ጋር ካለው ጥልቅ የፖለቲካ ትግል ጋር የተሳሰረ መሆኑን ያሳያሉ።
oromo: Ispoortiin kubbaa miillaa Falasxiin keessatti tapha qofa osoo hin taane, dhimma lafaa, eenyummaa fi bakka bu'iinsa biyyoolessaa irratti iddoo qabsoo cimaa ta'eera. Falasxiinonni diigamuu iddoo tapha kubbaa miillaa kan Zoonii Qabame (West Bank) fi rakkoolee beekamtii idil-addunyaa irratti ka'an keessatti rakkina guddaa keessa jiru. Qabsoon kun ispoortichi qabsoo siyaasaa kan waraana Israa'el irratti taasifamu waliin akkamitti walitti hidhamee akka jiru agarsiisa.

title: The story behind football stars Messi and Yamal’s viral photo
english: A heartwarming photograph showing a young Lionel Messi bathing a baby Lamine Yamal has recently captured global attention online. The image was taken years ago by photographer Joan Monfort during a promotional photoshoot for a charity calendar. As both players compete on the world stage, this surprising connection from the past has fascinated football fans everywhere.
amharic: ሊዮኔል ሜሲ ገና ሕፃን የነበረውን ላሚን ያማልን ሲያጠምቅ የሚያሳይ አሮጌ ፎቶግራፍ በማህበራዊ ሚዲያ ላይ ትልቅ መነጋገሪያ ሆኗል። ፎቶው የተነሳው ከዓመታት በፊት በፎቶግራፍ አንሺው ጆአን ሞንፎርት አማካኝነት ለበጎ አድራጎት የቀን መቁጠሪያ ማስታወቂያ ነበር። ሁለቱ ተጫዋቾች በአለም አቀፍ መድረክ ላይ ሲፋለሙ፣ ይህ ያልተጠበቀ የቀድሞ ትውውቃቸው የእግር ኳስ አፍቃሪዎችን ቀልብ ስቧል።
oromo: Suurreen miira namaa tuquufi Lionel Messi isa ijoollee ture Lamine Yamal yeroo daa'imummaa isaa bishaan dhiqu agarsiisu guyyoota darban kana miidiyaa hawaasaa irratti bal'inaan tamsaa'eera. Suurri kun kan kaafame waggoota hedduu dura yeroo qophii kalandaraa gargaarsa namoomaa irratti  φωτοግራfer Joan Monfort tiin ture. Taphattoonni kunneen lamaan dorgommii idil-addunyaa irratti wal-dorgomaa jiran kun, walitti dhufeenyi isaanii inni durii kun jaallattoota kubbaa miilaa biratti ajaa'ibsiisaa ta'eera.

title: Why is China protesting about the nationalisation of British Steel?
english: The British government recently nationalized British Steel to preserve domestic production and secure thousands of jobs at the Scunthorpe plant. In response, the Chinese owner, Jingye Group, is demanding full financial compensation and accusing the UK of violating international investment standards. This conflict creates a major diplomatic challenge for the incoming UK prime minister, who inherits a tense trade dispute with China.
amharic: የብሪታንያ መንግስት የሀገር ውስጥ ምርትን ለመጠበቅ እና በስካንቶርፕ ፋብሪካ የሚገኙ በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ የስራ እድሎችን ለማዳን ብሪቲሽ ስቲልን በቁጥጥሩ ስር አድርጓል። ለዚህ ውሳኔ ምላሽ የሰጡት የቻይናው ባለቤት ጂንግዬ ግሩፕ፣ ተመጣጣኝ የካሳ ክፍያ እንዲፈጸምላቸው በመጠየቅ ብሪታንያ አለም አቀፍ የኢንቨስትመንት ህጎችን ጥሳለች ሲሉ ከሰዋል። ይህ አለመግባባት ስልጣን በሚረከቡት አዲሱ የብሪታንያ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር እና በቻይና መካከል ትልቅ የዲፕሎማሲያዊ ፈተና ሆኖ ተጋርጧል።
oromo: Mootummaan Biritishii, oomisha biyya keessaa eeguufi qaxarrii kumaatamaan lakkaa'amu hambisuuf jecha dhaabbata 'British Steel' mootummaa jalatti deebiseera. Dhaabbanni Chaayinaa kan ta'e 'Jingye Group', tarkaanfii kana mormuudhaan miidhaa gaheef kaffaltiin beenyaa guutuun akka kennamuuf gaafateera; mootummaan Biritishis seera invastimantii idil-addunyaa cabseera jechuun himateera. Walitti bu'iinsi kun, muummee ministiraa Biritishii haaraa aangoo qabachaa jiraniifi Chaayinaa gidduutti qormaata dippilomaasii guddaa ta'ee jira.

title: Jordan shoots down three Iranian missiles
english: Jordanian military forces successfully intercepted three Iranian missiles that were directed toward their territory. One additional missile landed in an unpopulated region, but the incident resulted in no injuries or property destruction. Officials confirmed that the country remained safe throughout the event.
amharic: የዮርዳኖስ ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች ወደ አገሪቱ የተተኮሱ ሶስት የኢራን ሚሳይሎችን በመጥለፍ አክሽፈዋል። ሌላ አንድ ሚሳይል ሰው በማይኖርበት የሩቅ አካባቢ የወደቀ ቢሆንም፣ በሰውም ሆነ በንብረት ላይ ምንም አይነት ጉዳት አልደረሰም። መንግስት ክስተቱ ምንም አይነት ጉዳት ሳያስከትል መጠናቀቁን በይፋ አረጋግጧል።
oromo: Humnoonni waraana Yordaanos xiyyaraa fi meeshaalee waraana kanneen Iraan gara biyyattii erge keessaa sadii rukutanii kuffisaniiru. Meeshaan waraanaa afurffaan naannoo nama hin jirretti kan kufe yoo ta'u, miidhaan lubbuus ta'e qabeenyaa irra ga'e hin jiru. Mootummaan akka ibsetti, rakkoon akkanaa kun miidhaa tokko malee darbuu isaa mirkaneesseera.

title: Iran accuses US of violating international law after strike on nuclear plant
english: The United States conducted airstrikes on Iran, including a construction site at the Darkhovin nuclear plant, which Iranian officials condemned as a violation of international law. The US military stated these actions were intended to protect shipping routes and retaliate for attacks against American personnel. While the International Atomic Energy Agency is investigating the incident, they have confirmed that the targeted plant did not contain nuclear materials and poses no radiation threat.
amharic: አሜሪካ በኢራን የኒውክሌር ጣቢያ ግንባታ ላይ ያደረሰችውን የአየር ጥቃት ተከትሎ ኢራን ይህ ድርጊት የአለም አቀፍ ህግን የሚጥስ ነው ስትል አውግዛለች። የአሜሪካ ጦር ጥቃቱ የተፈፀመው የባህር ላይ ትራንስፖርትን ለመጠበቅ እና በአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ላይ ለደረሰው ጥቃት ምላሽ ለመስጠት እንደሆነ አስታውቋል። የአለም አቀፉ የኒውክሌር ኢነርጂ ኤጀንሲ እንደገለጸው፣ ጥቃት የተፈጸመበት ቦታ ምንም አይነት የኒውክሌር ቁሳቁስ የሌለበት በመሆኑ የጨረር ስጋት እንደሌለ አስታውቋል።
oromo: Ameerikaan buufata elektirikii niwukilaaraa Darkhovin kan ijaaramaa jiru irratti haleellaa qilleensaa raawwachuun ishee, mootummaan Iraan seera idil-addunyaa cabsuu dha jechuun balaaleffateera. Humnoonni waraana Ameerikaa haleellaan kun kan raawwatame daandiiwwan galaanaatti fayyadamtoota eeguuf fi loltoota Ameerikaa irratti haleellaa raawwatameef deebii kennuuf ta'uu ibsaniiru. Dhaabbanni anniisaa niwukilaaraa idil-addunyaa akka jedhetti, bakki haleellichi itti raawwatame kun meeshaalee niwukilaaraa kan hin qabne waan ta'eef, balaan raadiyaashinii akka hin jirre mirkaneesseera.

title: Video: US strikes damage Iran's civilian infrastructure
english: Military tensions between the United States and Iran have worsened, leading to direct attacks on civilian infrastructure. Recent American airstrikes in southern Iran have severely damaged local bridges and essential public facilities. In response to these actions, Iran reportedly launched an offensive against a water treatment plant located in Kuwait.
amharic: በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል ያለው የፖለቲካ ውጥረት እየተባባሰ በመምጣቱ የሁለቱ አገራት ግጭት በሲቪል መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ ጉዳት እያደረሰ ይገኛል። በቅርቡ የተካሄዱ የአሜሪካ የአየር ጥቃቶች በደቡባዊ ኢራን የሚገኙ ድልድዮችን እና ሌሎች መሠረታዊ አገልግሎቶችን አውድመዋል። ለዚህ ምላሽ ለመስጠትም ኢራን በኩዌት የሚገኝ የውኃ ማጣሪያ ጣቢያ ላይ ጥቃት ሰንዝራለች።
oromo: Walitti buutiin waraanaa gidduu Ameerikaa fi Iraan jiru hammaachaa dhufee, miidhaan bu'uuraalee misoomaa irratti geessisaa jira. Xiyyaaronni waraana Ameerikaa kibba Iraanitti raawwatan, riqichotaa fi tajaajiloota bu'uuraa iddoo sanaa irratti miidhaa guddaa geessisaniiru. Iraanis tarkaanfii kanaaf deebii kennuuf jecha, biyya Kuweyt keessatti buufata qulqulleessa bishaan irratti haleellaa raawwatteetti.

title: Iran executes two men over killing of police officers
english: Iranian authorities have executed two men found guilty of murdering four police officers during anti-government protests in Isfahan last January. The individuals were convicted of brutally attacking the officers before setting them on fire. This action follows a period of nationwide unrest where many demonstrators have also lost their lives.
amharic: የኢራን ባለስልጣናት ባለፈው ጥር ወር በኢስፋሃን በተካሄደው ፀረ-መንግስት ተቃውሞ ወቅት አራት የፖሊስ መኮንኖችን በመግደል ወንጀል የተፈረደባቸውን ሁለት ሰዎች ገድለዋል። ግለሰቦቹ ፖሊሶቹን በጭካኔ በማጥቃት በእሳት አቃጥለዋል በሚል ክስ ነው የሞት ቅጣት የተፈረደባቸው። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው በሀገሪቱ ተቃውሞዎች ተቀስቅሰው በነበሩበት ወቅት በርካታ ተቃዋሚዎች ህይወታቸውን ባጡበት ወቅት ነው።
oromo: Mootummaan Iraan namoota lama kanneen ji'a Fulbaana darbe magaalaa Isfahaan keessatti poolisoota afur ajjeesan jedhamanii himataman ajjeeseera. Namoonni kunneen poolisoota sana erga miidhanii booda ibiddaan gubuun himataman. Tarkaanfiin kun kan fudhatame yeroo mormii biyyoolessaa guutuu biyyattiitti geggeeffamaa ture keessatti namoonni baay'een lubbuu isaanii dhabanitti.

title: Why were Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested? Will they be extradited to UK?
english: Influencer brothers Andrew and Tristan Tate were arrested in Miami based on a warrant issued by the United Kingdom. British authorities are pursuing their extradition to face dozens of new criminal charges, including rape, sex trafficking, and assault, dating back to incidents between 2010 and 2017. The brothers, who hold dual citizenship, are now at the center of an international legal case as the UK government moves forward with these serious allegations.
amharic: አንድሪው እና ትሪስታን ታይት የተባሉ ተፅዕኖ ፈጣሪ ወንድማማቾች በእንግሊዝ መንግስት በተሰጠ ትእዛዝ መሰረት ማያሚ ውስጥ በቁጥጥር ስር ውለዋል። የእንግሊዝ ባለስልጣናት በሁለቱ ወንድማማቾች ላይ በተነሱ አስገድዶ መድፈር፣ የሰዎች ዝውውር እና ጥቃት የመሳሰሉ አዳዲስ ክሶች ምክንያት ወደ ሀገራቸው እንዲመለሱ እየጠየቁ ነው። በሁለቱ አገራት ዜግነት ያላቸው ወንድማማቾች ከ2010 እስከ 2017 ባለው ጊዜ ውስጥ በፈጸሙት ተብሎ በሚጠረጠር ወንጀል የተነሳ በአለም አቀፍ የህግ ሂደት ውስጥ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Obboloonni dhiibbaa uummachuu danda'an Andrew fi Tristan Tate jedhaman, mootummaa UK ajaja baaseen magaala Maayamiitti to'annoo jala oolaniiru. Aangooti UK obboloota kana irratti himannaa gudeeddii, daldala qaama saalaa fi miidhaa qaamaa dabalatee himannaa haaraa hedduu dhiyeessuun, gara biyya isaanii akka deebi'an barbaadaa jiru. Lammii biyyoota lamaa kan ta'an obboloonni kun, badii bara 2010 hanga 2017 gidduutti raawwatame jedhamee shakkamuun seera addunyaa keessatti qabamaniiru.

title: Why have India’s Gen Z protesters called for a march to parliament?
english: Young Indian protesters, who call themselves the 'cockroach' movement, have announced a march to parliament to demand the resignation of Prime Minister Narendra Modi and his education minister. This decision follows the forced removal of activist Sonam Wangchuk from his hunger strike protest by police. The movement, fueled by student outrage over major examination scandals and systemic political decay, is preparing for a large-scale demonstration as the new parliamentary session begins.
amharic: ራሳቸውን 'ኮክሮች' ወይም በረሮ ብለው የሚጠሩ ወጣት የህንድ ተቃዋሚዎች የጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ናሬንድራ ሞዲ እና የትምህርት ሚኒስትራቸውን ስልጣን መልቀቅ በመጠየቅ ወደ ፓርላማ ሰልፍ እንደሚወጡ አስታውቀዋል። ይህ ውሳኔ የተወሰነው አክቲቪስት ሶናም ዋንግቹክ በረሃብ አድማ ላይ እያሉ በፖሊስ በኃይል ከተወሰዱ በኋላ ነው። ተማሪዎችን ያካተተው ይህ የተቃውሞ እንቅስቃሴ፣ በአገሪቱ ውስጥ በተከሰቱ የፈተና ውጤቶች መጭበርበር እና በአስተዳደሩ ላይ ባላቸው ቅሬታ የተነሳ አዲስ የፓርላማ ስብሰባ ሲጀመር ትልቅ ሰልፍ ለማድረግ እየተዘጋጁ ነው።
oromo: Mataduree 'cockroach' ykn 'injilleyyee' jedhanii of waaman kanneen ta'an dargaggoonni Indiyaa, Ministira Muummee Narendra Modiifi Ministira barnootaa isaanii aangoorraa akka bu'an gaafachuun gara mana maree biyyattiitti hiriira bahuuf murteessaniiru. Murteen kun kan dhufe erga dhaabbileen nageenyaa aktivistii beekamaa Sonam Wangchuk hiriira beelaa gaggeessaa turan humnaan bakka sanaa kaasee booda. Barattootaan kan gaggeeffamaa jiru kun, rakkoolee qormaata biyyattii keessatti mudatan fi aaruu sirna bulchiinsa irratti qaban ibsuuf yeroo mana mareen biyyattii walgahii isaa jalqabu hiriira guddaa gaggeessuuf qophiirra jiru.

title: Indian court rejects bid to release hunger-striking activist from hospital
english: An Indian court has denied a request to discharge activist Sonam Wangchuk from a government hospital where he was held after ending a three-week hunger strike. His wife claims the police-guarded facility is essentially an illegal detention center and has requested a transfer to a private clinic. However, the judge ruled that the medical intervention is appropriate and denied the petition for his immediate release.
amharic: የህንድ ፍርድ ቤት ለአንድ ወር ያህል የረሃብ አድማ ሲያደርግ የቆየው አክቲቪስት ሶናም ዋንግቹክ ከመንግስት ሆስፒታል እንዲለቀቅ የቀረበለትን ጥያቄ ውድቅ አድርጓል። ባለቤቱ አክቲቪስቱ በፖሊስ ቁጥጥር ስር ሆኖ በሆስፒታል መታሰሩ ህገ-ወጥ ነው በማለት ወደ ሌላ የግል ሆስፒታል እንዲዛወር ጠይቃለች። ዳኛው ግን የህክምና እርምጃው አስፈላጊ እና ህጋዊ ነው በሚል የተለቀቀበትን ጥያቄ አልተቀበሉትም።
oromo: Mana murtii Indiyaa tokko, duula beelaa guyyootii hedduuf gaggeessaa kan ture aktivistii Sonam Wangchuk hospitaala mootummaa keessaa gadhiifamuu qaba jedhamee dhiyaateef mormeera. Haati manaa isaa, aktiivistichi poolisiin eegamuun hospitaala keessatti hidhamuun isaa seeraan ala dha jechuun gara hospitaala dhuunfaatti akka jijjiiramu gaafatteetti. Ta'us, abbaan murtiichaa tajaajilli yaalaa kennamaa jiru sirrii fi barbaachisaa dha jechuun, battaluma sanatti akka gadhiifamu gaafatamus fudhatama dhabeera.

title: Spain or Argentina, who will win the FIFA World Cup? Ex-player predictions
english: The 2026 FIFA World Cup final will feature a highly anticipated match between Spain and Argentina. While Argentina aims to secure consecutive titles, many former players and experts favor Spain to win due to their strong teamwork and tactical discipline. Statistical models also identify Spain as the favorite, giving them a high probability of claiming their second World Cup trophy.
amharic: የ2026ቱ የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ በስፔን እና በአርጀንቲና መካከል በሚደረግ ተጠባቂ ጨዋታ ይቋጫል። አርጀንቲና ለሁለተኛ ጊዜ ተከታታይ ዋንጫዋን ለማንሳት ስትጥር፣ በርካታ የቀድሞ ተጫዋቾች እና የዘርፉ ባለሙያዎች ግን የስፔን ቡድን በአንድነት እና በስልት የተደራጀ በመሆኑ አሸናፊ እንደሚሆን ይገምታሉ። የስታቲስቲክስ መረጃዎችም ስፔን ዋንጫውን የማንሳት እድሏ ከፍተኛ እንደሆነ ያሳያሉ።
oromo: Qophiin xumura tapha waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 biyyoota Ispeenii fi Arjantiinaa gidduutti kan taasifamu ta’a. Arjantiinaan waancaa walitti aansitee injifachuuf kan karorfatte yoo ta’u, taphattoonni durii fi ogeeyyiin hedduun garuu garee Ispeenii kan injifatu ta’uu ibsaniiru. Kunis kan ta’eef isaan tapha garee cimaa fi tarsiimoo gaarii waan qabaniifidha; akkasumas qorannoon lakkoofsaas carraan Ispeen waancicha fudhachuu olaanaa akka ta’e mirkaneesseera.
